name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: We're short -- can you help out?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
I wanted to make sure you saw my note about our mid-month deadline and the increasing urgency for the need to defend our Senate Majority. It's more important than ever for us to defend the Senate Majority so we can continue to fight for the American people.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/SubscriptionCenter/BlackburnSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=42512399&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTc2MTQ4OTc4MgS2&spReportId=MTc2MTQ4OTc4MgS2)
****
****
__
********

Hi Peter,

I know it's a Friday night, so I'll make this quick.

I wanted to make sure you saw my note about our mid-month deadline and the increasing urgency for the need to defend our Senate Majority. My finance team just informed me that we're still $3,678 behind where we need to be in just a few hours.

I've authorized 3X matching so we can TRIPLE the impact, but only if you make a contribution right now.

**[**EMERGENCY 3X MATCH >>> **](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MTIzOTkS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ4OTc4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
---

****

Nancy Pelosi's latest $3 TRILLION "rescue" proposal is a socialist wishlist, jam-packed with requests unrelated to providing relief for the American people, with less than 1% of funding set aside for COVID-19 tests.

Pelosi also refuses to hold China accountable for their role in this pandemic, choosing instead to point fingers and launch investigations into President Trump!

Conservatives must retain the Senate in order to stop the Democrats and their partisan games. I hope that I can count on the best grassroots team in the nation to step up and help us secure the funds and resources necessary to fight the Left's partisan games and defend our Senate Majority.

**Rush in your 3X matched donation by 11:59 TONIGHT!**

Donate here: [https://secure.winred.com/btvf/thank-you-for-your-help](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MTIzOTkS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ4OTc4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Gratefully,

Marsha Blackburn

\--- Forwarded Message ---

To: Peter <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
From: Marsha Blackburn
Date: Thursday, May 14, 2020 at 8:56 PM CDT
Re: China has threatened to sanction me

******
Mid-Month Deadline: 11:59 TOMORROW******

Peter,

While Democrats are back to playing political games and pointing fingers at the President, I've been fighting to hold China accountable. I've called China out on their human rights violations, their infringements on our privacy, their violent response to the Hong Kong freedom fighters, and their role in the coronavirus pandemic. **Now, the Communist Party of China is threatening to sanction me.**

Peter, it's all on the line in November, and with the recent reports about China, it's more important than ever for us to defend the Senate Majority so we can continue to fight for the American people.

**We 're $12,642 short of our mid-month fundraising goal and if we fall behind, we'll be at risk of losing it all.**

Can you help us catch up and ensure that we hit our goal by MIDNIGHT TOMORROW?

**[**RUSH DONATE -> **](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MTIzOTkS1&kn=19&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ4OTc4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
---

China lied, Peter, and it cost us lives. You sent me to the Senate to fight for our values and what's right -- and that means standing up to China. I'm proud to be leading this fight with my conservative colleagues, but if we don't close the fundraising gap and hit our goal, Republicans may not have the resources needed to keep the Majority and continue shining a light on China's lies, scheming, and deceit.

**Help me keep up the fight

[Chip in $10](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MTIzOTkS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ4OTc4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Chip in $25](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MTIzOTkS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ4OTc4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Chip in $50](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MTIzOTkS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ4OTc4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Chip in $100](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MTIzOTkS1&kn=20&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ4OTc4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Chip in another amount](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MTIzOTkS1&kn=21&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTQ4OTc4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: What the data shows
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
we're now just 18 days away from Indiana’s June 2 primary election | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=85a4917a9873415ebd3ffda9031cf89a&_e=NP-CkL5giikZlh5WPQAHdQod_TbfFydZres_DsFHY6hILZ6SMaTdEv-BtNsMJ0mpmzLXotMczh7TiYh3_uvM9pdmYLrlZZFyTPfzYMxIkZthv0DXo8FoDqa9gfCPAJ25b9hriSJ9E0N8VaWYzjKVt9gkwOIiwoolXiHg3Sr_WDpsSRbX0pWAF50HIo56-7nj67NUzTdeYp-AbM9rULpyqcW8Qxa5oLFkX1Y-uAIICGOvunfH-8FQBgpiWoSaYK696Cm-YeAe_Yau-YQUy-okpjHx2OUxqScUC9mv1sYY_tfdEGl4r8Ih_UoQGDkucGwH8MU5zE_IlQlr23rvE75woyYBXO3-0wu7fxHjyvLCg4K8x-1CT6U_idanRBzKBH9P) |
---|---|---
Friends,

Indiana’s making progress. When Governor Holcomb laid out his **[Back on Track plan](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=85a4917a9873415ebd3ffda9031cf89a&_e=NP-CkL5giikZlh5WPQAHdQod_TbfFydZres_DsFHY6hILZ6SMaTdEv-BtNsMJ0mpmzLXotMczh7TiYh3_uvM9pdmYLrlZZFyTPfzYMxIkZthv0DXo8FoDqa9gfCPAJ25b9hriSJ9E0N8VaWYzjKVt9gkwOIiwoolXiHg3Sr_WDqD41_174vCkCZv4AbS7PfbyiiVacV9Meo6pjPcI72nvmCst2QREWCYKJolLncPbA_KNQNVggCNoGj9SQjkzd4lN081RHnALevTvFTm66wZ0aPATO1gEGsZVpr5GP6FfGfAgQmevw6V6Upd2x3iBJfAOOzNec8htlpwzqnFgDmmecqxEA-R-CwSHeRiAz_xGHwj-e_mV01aI999JJo6nMwt)** earlier this month, he told us about four guiding principles that he’d be watching along the way – _**letting the data drive his decisions.**_

_**And so far, the data is showing positive movement –**_
1. **Hospitalizations** – the number of Hoosiers hospitalized with COVID-19 has dropped from 170 on April 1 to 71 on May 12.
2. **Surge Capacity** – As of just yesterday, 40% of Indiana’s ICU beds are available, and ventilator availability is remaining steady at 80%.
3. **Testing** – More than 170 testing sites are available throughout Indiana, including 50 free testing sites administered by the Indiana State Department of Health. Find a site near you **[here.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=85a4917a9873415ebd3ffda9031cf89a&_e=NP-CkL5giikZlh5WPQAHdUBjxI3u-5aTBUnvILYKS4A6uCKUabZDE8kZ5MIVhRyjGUcOY6yny1zilNwF-YCD3aGHRk0tcDK_-Ca7JE-2WadS00RebcT5JxSlTmIBt-yR5cAxTphuL5ujibWuus0wf_OkS2FrmDh-n_8a7MA8v9KY-n1p7cLD1jM6rS6HDjNlWI5hC7GiY6cGtForv6DlFAvqQuioymaJxd-qqsKfQn3cJP8JyPRM52_dIDrsyT4TcTi2IxCox6XIcG-ZGu056kMmuNXjhcScMeDSuyE1J3FENIzyy5vmftJs2vWC4Lpnp0n7MUN-3XfVR3dghBb_-tzeeqo5hlSi18TjXN8KyCfx2R2SoFkbSnTbSjEKVi4NoDxXx2eOENRqK6oiDe9xqQ%3D%3D)**

4. **Contact Tracing** – More than 500 Hoosiers are currently working as contact tracers – doctors, nurses, epidemiologists, medical students and more. They’re working daily tracking and limiting the spread of this virus. And remember, your information always remains private.

With this progress, we’re _**now just 18 days away from Indiana’s June 2 primary election.**_ You should definitely make sure you exercise your right to vote – and you have a choice on how you vote:
* **Voting Absentee By Mail** – For this election, any Hoosier can choose to vote absentee. But make sure you request your ballot by Thursday, May 21. You can even request your ballot online at **[IndianaVoters.in.gov](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=85a4917a9873415ebd3ffda9031cf89a&_e=NP-CkL5giikZlh5WPQAHdXKOsmUcSa4Gwvt2_SILoj13EWify5VNZ0qnoUqUEemyjDcW-h6ZSu3SNB_N5Mna-ALP9yPd2czRW6cnXDQmIucropsqYqkWuSV_Ude6P6Gpkcfv2kKWARNCQ9EKYT4s2gc7nTIatFEWrmFe0H7E-3tekNN0QKTZG46F0B9kcyyD3SJb6U9ZZN7RQ5OL2ZjSkXFh52PnSD0yRPxGf1tOW6er5kWPSGKjfZYPH-ylhmeg0-EfjGH0ylw5GC2YQ_OLPFTRLFOqor271dRSI7Nebd8FNA8Es42RPibzbN7GLlWalh9LvNZr7DJ1dKkpqRPfwM1HAaucyNTLYXvRdKzXPvSlIjeqPRahemqkCUOrErnF)**.
* **Voting Early In-Person** – Early in-person voting begins on May 26. Check **[IndianaVoters.in.gov](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=85a4917a9873415ebd3ffda9031cf89a&_e=NP-CkL5giikZlh5WPQAHdXKOsmUcSa4Gwvt2_SILoj13EWify5VNZ0qnoUqUEemyjDcW-h6ZSu3SNB_N5Mna-ALP9yPd2czRW6cnXDQmIucropsqYqkWuSV_Ude6P6Gpkcfv2kKWARNCQ9EKYT4s2gc7nTIatFEWrmFe0H7E-3vl7Lc34ZPDjKJjToOiYBMyzFV3bAfXkZq4I_8kATvKY9DUASjr8S9otbcpX-FoYNCXkJ_hZkN4LSxrMUHebEItTHX8J1CIjHpSlTQr_c8VEAZgHMQSITgwm0h8oBd6LKGMptVkYNyT7uGcGOwcJ1kCX6vkeg2LAnXIp_k71nmCw2zUDdz21_WhF9595akdiAD3KBRwxWzQpB_VNAmt6lGm)** to make sure you know your polling place and hours.
* **Voting on Primary Day** – Polls will be open from 6 a.m. to 6 p.m. on June 2.

And know that if you choose to vote in person, the state has acquired the supplies necessary to keep our polling places clean and our poll workers safe –
* 5,000 gallons of hand sanitizer
* 10,000 refillable bottles
* Over 4,000 gallons of disinfectant cleaner for voting machines and electronic poll books
* 10,000 refillable spray bottles
* 85,000 microfiber cloths
* Over 300,000 pairs of disposable gloves
* 200,000 facemasks
* 25,000 face shields
* Over 3,500 acrylic sneeze guards

We’re making progress, and there’s a lot to look forward to Indiana. But only through your continued efforts will Indiana continue these advances in getting back on track.

#BackOnTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: 4 metrics that determine if we move to Phase 2
body:
Plus, info on next week's virtual town hall
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
As we end our first week of Phase One of our reopening plan, I'm so proud of Rhode Islanders for following our guidance around social distancing, wearing face masks, and taking safety precautions. And I'm impressed by our innovative businesses and retailers that have been able to safely reopen. If we continue on this path, it's my hope that we'll be able to move into Phase 2 by early June. As we make decisions about reopening, we need to keep our eyes on the data. In particular, there are four different metrics that paint an accurate picture of whether the virus is continuing to decline, or whether it's beginning a resurgence. Today, I want to talk to you about the four things we're tracking as we consider whether we need to go back a phase, and whether it's safe to move forward.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015zQPpZWe7dI-UUP-GeAupL-8yM153YAEE6V88MKBSHFO4IM04y37dhA4bFQym_L6Q3ScpXfF-pQWWWLnfCwRrevEWY9omiil1sPwQkrSJgX5uIYogoOgv53TqQ11Ik3e01zBGWMuVjJ0_zxO-yceLQ==&c=Z9zoB_swXtqzkBZieKxRHz_zjHPXb1qpodsiZ8gDqtKQoFvkamYzEw==&ch=hm3s2kOReB_hRKpNXQODMEYfOByHKsYJkIEzAJDRKWO1HRLogq5-dg==)
---
| 1) Hospital capacity: We need prevent our hospitals from becoming overwhelmed with COVID-19 patients. Every Rhode lander must be able to access the health care they need. Currently, about 30% of all available beds for COVID patients are filled. That number is about 20% in the in ICU. This is great news. If we continue to see less than 70% of beds filled by COVID patients, and the same for ICU beds, then that will tell us it's safe to continue moving forward. However, if we see a spike and end up with 85% or more of these beds filled, either in overall hospital capacity or specifically in the ICU, then we may need to scale back. 2) New hospitalizations: This is related to the first, and it is another indicator of the trend of the virus. For example, if we are below 70% capacity but we are seeing a recent spike in new hospitalizations, that's a sign that, even though the first metric has been met, we may not be ready to move forward. Right now we are consistently seeing fewer than 30 new hospitalizations per day, and that's a good indicator that we can move forward. But if that number is consistently above 50, we may need to move back. 3) Rate of spread: This is measured using what's called the "R value." This measures how many people are infected by each infected person. Over the last few months, we've been able to lower our R value from between 3-4 down to its current rate around 1. That's great news, and it means everything we've done to contain the spread has worked. If the R value continues to be around 1.1 or lower, then it'll be safe to think about moving into the next phase. If it gets to 1.3, 1.4, 1.5 or higher, that means the virus is picking up steam again, and we need to watch it closely and think about scaling back in order to make sure we're not seeing another surge. 4) Doubling rate of current hospitalizations: This is a metric you've probably heard about a lot in the news, and it's an important way to look at the trends of the virus. Currently, hospitalizations are stable or declining, which means no doubling is occurring. That's what we want to happen. If hospitalizations start increasing, we want to be sure that's happening at a slow enough rate that it doesn't overwhelm our hospital system. As long as it is taking more than a month to see a doubling of hospitalizations, we feel confident that we are not seeing an overwhelming surge. But if we start seeing a doubling in twenty days or less, that's when we need to tread lightly and think about putting restrictions back in place.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015zQPpZWe7dI-UUP-GeAupL-8yM153YAEE6V88MKBSHFO4IM04y37dnmn1vhsvqiIXG74eoeussn_Zk2OwPV98DxaepPXUCsNTVtv2UBK_Pw-CtJtzbgY11kY6N7rR7mPwY7Vl7G4VvR2op5DEO0wqlILpIozL12aXaatAH4yHoXYwsxfFdm0fFBnQOnG5wRddVkIOknDZlc=&c=Z9zoB_swXtqzkBZieKxRHz_zjHPXb1qpodsiZ8gDqtKQoFvkamYzEw==&ch=hm3s2kOReB_hRKpNXQODMEYfOByHKsYJkIEzAJDRKWO1HRLogq5-dg==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015zQPpZWe7dI-UUP-GeAupL-8yM153YAEE6V88MKBSHFO4IM04y37dnmn1vhsvqiIXG74eoeussn_Zk2OwPV98DxaepPXUCsNTVtv2UBK_Pw-CtJtzbgY11kY6N7rR7mPwY7Vl7G4VvR2op5DEO0wqlILpIozL12aXaatAH4yHoXYwsxfFdm0fFBnQOnG5wRddVkIOknDZlc=&c=Z9zoB_swXtqzkBZieKxRHz_zjHPXb1qpodsiZ8gDqtKQoFvkamYzEw==&ch=hm3s2kOReB_hRKpNXQODMEYfOByHKsYJkIEzAJDRKWO1HRLogq5-dg==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| These four metrics should give you a clear picture of what we're tracking to determine if we can move forward or if we need to move backward. Of course, none of these exist in a vacuum -- they all influence one another. But given where we are now and where we expect to be going, these are the data points that will help us identify a trend. If these four data points, taken together, are trending in the right direction, we can continue to ease restrictions. And if they're trending in the wrong direction, we need to keep a close eye on it and think about moving back. It's also important to note that our supply levels are a factor we're continuing to monitor. I previously told you that we wouldn't go into Phase 1 unless we were absolutely confident that our testing capacity, our contact tracing, our PPE, our efforts for the most at-risk communities, and our supports for those in quarantine were all on the right track and in good shape to handle a continued, long-term response. I have every expectation that this will continue to be the case. These systems are all getting stronger every day, and we are continuing to build steady supply chains for everything we need.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015zQPpZWe7dI-UUP-GeAupL-8yM153YAEE6V88MKBSHFO4IM04y37du0Uf4zzOlCSnKhsSm__Uxl_fVvzDXUDfeyOM1taMq8NwUt2r1mifsv21GeQuWBJF40_hG-ipXNczNtUAKH0aOEQqiZhhonK9rErFD4-VdK4LeVducTugyVRAH0KpcCz0DOjNF6U4rDh6HunlSF91zisaE7KXpAa7WsHEmTefG6bGasNs2HbU7k=&c=Z9zoB_swXtqzkBZieKxRHz_zjHPXb1qpodsiZ8gDqtKQoFvkamYzEw==&ch=hm3s2kOReB_hRKpNXQODMEYfOByHKsYJkIEzAJDRKWO1HRLogq5-dg==)
---
| Finally, while these metrics are focused on statewide trends, I want to be clear that we're also closely monitoring trends on the community level and are prepared to respond to a local outbreak immediately. We are collecting and tracking data on a granular level and I am in regular contact with mayors and town managers. We are getting through this together, and I fully intend to continue forward on this path toward reopening. In the spirit of ensuring we have comprehensive supports in place for at-risk populations, I want to end this email by talking about older Rhode Islanders. We know that this virus can be particularly hard on older adults and that they will need to continue to take extra precautions, and we want to support them. So, next Thursday at 11 a.m. I'm going to be hosting a Facebook Live for older Rhode Islanders and their families and caregivers.If you're an older adult or a caregiver of an older adult, we want to hear from you. You can submit your questions through social media channels - on my Facebook and Twitter pages and on the pages of our Office of Healthy Aging. I'm looking forward to next week's conversation.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015zQPpZWe7dI-UUP-GeAupL-8yM153YAEE6V88MKBSHFO4IM04y37du0Uf4zzOlCS1PyIvZNIffmL3mEyaaVYwQ4T-MtjtaI1pdQ58UldhnJeMO-YUWjexguvzsY-HHG9tj_Oiuqy8-xQhOncHgyheuDpxjZ6sUcuOVlGDuywIlma6IR09aSysL5J9OdI0_qXCBbrvSmCcptawOqrQ_GIS1kA-06hwhY9m9J3kFqXIYq8MnuYv0oRQg1dVEUaiosVB7kN024j9nYN_1IZcTJ-sS5OrYtdGMVHVS9GH8H7swnHgX3pbpoYyTwr_lAAGZqknayxhIXDVs4=&c=Z9zoB_swXtqzkBZieKxRHz_zjHPXb1qpodsiZ8gDqtKQoFvkamYzEw==&ch=hm3s2kOReB_hRKpNXQODMEYfOByHKsYJkIEzAJDRKWO1HRLogq5-dg==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=03ef8c0c-bc92-4b4e-ad59-ce67df886ffa)
---

Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with

name: Dean Browning
subject: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller: Chapter 5: “Setting The Record Straight.”
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
It seems I have ruffled Lisa Scheller's feathers as she is once again gasping for air while she LIES ABOUT MY RECORD AS COUNTY COMMISSIONER. In 2010, Lehigh County faced a scenario for the upcoming year (2011), where the County would have been left without any reserves. As a result, in September 2010, the County Executive submitted a budget for 2011 that called for a tax increase of $13 million or 16%. Right before the legal deadline to vote on that budget, some on the board demanded that the County Executive "redo" and resubmit a flat budget, but none of them offered even a single spending cut to make that happen. It was a Washington, D.C. - style gimmick, and I opposed it. Following that, an alternate budget prepared by the Commissioners with a 13% increase failed to garner enough votes to be approved, so the original budget with the 16% increase went into effect "by default," and without an up or down vote \- a quirk of the County's Home Rule Charter. Here is what The Morning Call had to say about my record on taxes the last time I was attacked for my fiscally conservative stance: 'No one did more on the Lehigh County commissioners than Browning did over his career to hold taxes down' \- May 8, 2018
"Browning never voted in favor of the [tax] hike," \- May 16, 2018

So why is Lying Lisa Scheller being deceitful and lying to the voters about my record?
It is because Lying Lisa Scheller is the only person in this race who voted to raise taxes.
If you live in Lehigh County, pull out your County tax bill for 2014, and you will see that it is 3% higher than it was in 2013.
To illustrate this point, I have included a redacted version of my own tax bills. Please see Figure 1 at the bottom of this email. You can clearly see the increase in taxes I paid from 2013 to 2014.
Every taxpayer in Lehigh County saw the exact same increase.
This lovely tax increase is all thanks to Lisa Scheller's yes vote as County Commissioner.
Yet Lying Lisa Scheller, a pure Establishment swamp rat, told the National Republican Congressional Committee that during her four years as Lehigh County Commissioner, she "successfully led efforts to cut taxes every year." I do not care about the Washington Establishment.
I care about the constituents of my district, and I plan to be elected based on my own merits and voting record.
This is just another example of the lengths Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller will go to lie about me, lie about her record, and say anything to get in with Washington's Swamp.
We cannot let her win on June 2, 2020!!
We need a TRUE CONSERVATIVE who wants to WORK FOR THE PEOPLE OF LEHIGH VALLEY! Not a career politician who only cares about their own self-gain!
I hope this helps to set the record straight and show that I am only one candidate who will for the interests of the American People.
Tune in next week for another chapter in the Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller.
For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Conservative Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. ~ Did you see Lying Lisa Scheller touting her support from the NRCC? She has gone so far as to blatantly lie about her record in cutting taxes when the facts speak differently: She voted for and approved a budget that caused Lehigh County taxpayers to pay more in 2014 than they did in 2013. We cannot let her win on June 2, 2020!!
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018hgfAFSQ90uza2oyHoZhen8SisPqs-d3Y9iOeC7SydMjPy4tdYnDhYyu75jgW6vR_hQs-9HYpY92cAYJkL2D9wC7bQunZ9tWohjjgYgLNf4HRu4Jzu-P3tUfL1zQKVDcLZtJBmdEYgCn7Kd27NJcGRyINiF3AvcVIOBg5WlSUuUgXfoi9fofZw==&c=UBj3latD_0q10bvWlhP_6mIDkveKh5f25RR1tpe5tgmtJKNgkCSHqg==&ch=A-xQistUBkW30s7Km_poQVuYu3DNraaqhSUkNv82bFQldkLCF3vYUw==)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, It seems I have ruffled Lisa Scheller's feathers as she is once again gasping for air while she LIES ABOUT MY RECORD AS COUNTY COMMISSIONER. In 2010, Lehigh County faced a scenario for the upcoming year (2011), where the County would have been left without any reserves. As a result, in September 2010, the County Executive submitted a budget for 2011 that called for a tax increase of $13 million or 16%. Right before the legal deadline to vote on that budget, some on the board demanded that the County Executive "redo" and resubmit a flat budget, but none of them offered even a single spending cut to make that happen. It was a Washington, D.C. - style gimmick, and I opposed it. Following that, an alternate budget prepared by the Commissioners with a 13% increase failed to garner enough votes to be approved, so the original budget with the 16% increase went into effect "by default," and without an up or down vote \- a quirk of the County's Home Rule Charter. Here is what The Morning Call had to say about my record on taxes the last time I was attacked for my fiscally conservative stance: 'No one did more on the Lehigh County commissioners than Browning did over his career to hold taxes down' \- May 8, 2018 "Browning never voted in favor of the [tax] hike," \- May 16, 2018 So why is Lying Lisa Scheller being deceitful and lying to the voters about my record? It is because Lying Lisa Scheller is the only person in this race who voted to raise taxes. If you live in Lehigh County, pull out your County tax bill for 2014, and you will see that it is 3% higher than it was in 2013. To illustrate this point, I have included a redacted version of my own tax bills. Please see Figure 1 at the bottom of this email. You can clearly see the increase in taxes I paid from 2013 to 2014. Every taxpayer in Lehigh County saw the exact same increase. This lovely tax increase is all thanks to Lisa Scheller's yes vote as County Commissioner. Yet Lying Lisa Scheller, a pure Establishment swamp rat, told the National Republican Congressional Committee that during her four years as Lehigh County Commissioner, she "successfully led efforts to cut taxes every year." I do not care about the Washington Establishment. I care about the constituents of my district, and I plan to be elected based on my own merits and voting record. This is just another example of the lengths Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller will go to lie about me, lie about her record, and say anything to get in with Washington's Swamp. We cannot let her win on June 2, 2020!! We need a TRUE CONSERVATIVE who wants to WORK FOR THE PEOPLE OF LEHIGH VALLEY! Not a career politician who only cares about their own self-gain! I hope this helps to set the record straight and show that I am only one candidate who will for the interests of the American People. Tune in next week for another chapter in the Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller. For Freedom, | | Dean Browning Conservative Republican for Congress, PA-07 P.S. ~ Did you see Lying Lisa Scheller touting her support from the NRCC? She has gone so far as to blatantly lie about her record in cutting taxes when the facts speak differently: She voted for and approved a budget that caused Lehigh County taxpayers to pay more in 2014 than they did in 2013. We cannot let her win on June 2, 2020!! | | | == | Figure 1 It is votes like these that hurt the people of our district. We cannot let Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller win on June 2, 2020. | | I urge you to donate to my campaign immediately so we can stop her. | | | == | == == | | | Dean Browning | 2432 W. Congress Street, Allentown, PA 18104 | | Sent by mailto:dean@browningforcongress.com in collaboration with |

body:
Margaret knows that one of the most critical parts of being a successful legislator is the ability to step back and listen to the people she serves: her constituents and her community.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17516678/196944953/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODQ0ZDhkYi04Mjk3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FNNCM4C-9QyGYpXDOrWBIJGUO0hDwwp5hAtUKwEvwYE=&emci=c1744402-b096-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=7844d8db-8297-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Hi there,

Margaret knows that one of the most critical parts of being a successful legislator is the ability to step back and listen to the people she serves: her constituents and her community.

It's important as she continues to work to flip Florida’s 16th Congressional District that she understands what issues you and your family care most about.

The issues that so many people in our community care about — clean water, good schools, and access to health care — will continue to be the foundation of Margaret's campaign.

And as we continue to focus on grassroots change and building this movement, we need to know what issues you and your family prioritize. It is helpful for us to learn your stories and hear your ideas for change. Thank you for being part of our work.

name: Tina Smith
subject: Bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
I have some bad news. **Last night was the deadline for our $50,000 mid-FEC goal and we fell short by $10,213. That doesn’t bode well for the second half of this quarter.** To make matters worse, Republicans will formally nominate Jason Lewis to face me in November at their state convention today. Once that happens, right-wing groups and super PACs could start dumping money into our race at any second. From here on out, it’s a sprint to the general election. So, we decided to extend the deadline until tonight. Our team will now close the books on our fundraising numbers _tonight_ , May 16th, at 11:59 p.m. **Can you add a $10 donation to help us raise the remaining $10,213 of our goal? Our campaign has seen real momentum these last few weeks, and we need to show everyone from our opponent to the press that our team can keep it up.
I've seen what this campaign is capable of, and that’s why I'm confident we can fill the gap in the next few hours if folks like you dig deep. Thanks!
— Tina

name: Minnesota House DFL
subject: DEADLINE: session ending Sunday
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/WyuG4fToEqqg1a_BCcPMl879tZ4w1sTBa1xBrt8i1GY=/loFRQU1p1Coq8_CQeQhP4P8r-JKwRmjTdF3hX3bPoJY=?refcode=051620)
| | Friend, The 2019-2020 legislative session must adjourn by midnight on Sunday, May 17th. Thank you for all of the support you've shown us as we've worked together to build a better future for all Minnesotans. The work of addressing the COVID-19 pandemic will continue into the summer, but the election is also right around the corner. Even while we continue to focus on helping Minnesotans safely rebuild economic security now and in the future, special interest groups will be spending heavily to flip our progressive majority. **Will you help us hit the ground running?** In the state of Minnesota, **you can donate up to $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you** by the state. _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Refundable $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/WyuG4fToEqqg1a_BCcPMl879tZ4w1sTBa1xBrt8i1GY=/loFRQU1p1Coq8_CQeQhP4P8r-JKwRmjTdF3hX3bPoJY=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=051620) [**Refundable $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/WyuG4fToEqqg1a_BCcPMl879tZ4w1sTBa1xBrt8i1GY=/loFRQU1p1Coq8_CQeQhP4P8r-JKwRmjTdF3hX3bPoJY=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=051620) [**Other Amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/WyuG4fToEqqg1a_BCcPMl879tZ4w1sTBa1xBrt8i1GY=/loFRQU1p1Coq8_CQeQhP4P8r-JKwRmjTdF3hX3bPoJY=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=051620) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ If you've already taken advantage of the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund program this year, we would really appreciate a continued investment - if you can afford it. Our work to defend and expand our DFL majority in the Minnesota House starts next week. We look forward to working together to build a broad, winning coalition. Thank you, House DFL Team [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/WyuG4fToEqqg1a_BCcPMl879tZ4w1sTBa1xBrt8i1GY=/loFRQU1p1Coq8_CQeQhP4P8r-JKwRmjTdF3hX3bPoJY=?refcode=051620)
---

name: Team Tuberville
subject: Top issues + Trump response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/03d10dea43634d09/025684fe71ca65afc3d6b838967d376c/33013) Peter, Coach wrote you the other day – did you see his message?

**We’ve launched a new issues survey, and we’re hoping that every supporter will take just a minute or two to respond!**

As we all practice social distancing, it’s important to Coach to continue hearing what’s on the minds of conservatives across Alabama. **[>> Tap or click to view the survey & respond >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/03d10dea43634d09/9718af8700608468c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** This is a great opportunity to let Coach know which issues are on your mind during this challenging time, your opinion on President Trump’s response to the pandemic, and what you think about the outlook in this top 2020 U.S. Senate election.

Thank you if you’ve already responded to Coach’s previous email. If you haven’t had a chance to share your thoughts yet, please take a moment to do so now.

Coach is eager to hear from you!

\- Team Tuberville **[>> Tap or click to view the survey & respond >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/03d10dea43634d09/f31eddaedec12b20c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** id:2020-03-26-15:29:47:923t Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc.

clean_body: Peter, Coach wrote you the other day – did you see his message? We’ve launched a new issues survey, and we’re hoping that every supporter will take just a minute or two to respond! As we all practice social distancing, it’s important to Coach to continue hearing what’s on the minds of conservatives across Alabama. This is a great opportunity to let Coach know which issues are on your mind during this challenging time, your opinion on President Trump’s response to the pandemic, and what you think about the outlook in this top 2020 U.S. Senate election. Thank you if you’ve already responded to Coach’s previous email. If you haven’t had a chance to share your thoughts yet, please take a moment to do so now. Coach is eager to hear from you! \- Team Tuberville id:2020-03-26-15:29:47:923t Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc.

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Are we going to tolerate this?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEZdBI_.QpNxmng&b=BK3Nh2JdlerWmIECMirIPw)
---
Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

I am a patriot! I was an original supporter of President Trump in 2015.

Unlike the Republican establishment, _I stuck with the president - through all the media’s attempts to discredit him._

I am proud of what President Trump has done during his first term, to include his handling of this horrible Coronavirus attack on our country!

If you are proud of our president, as I am, **[I need YOUR help urgently](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEZdBI_.QpNxmng&b=BK3Nh2JdlerWmIECMirIPw) to defeat my high-level radical socialist Democrat opponent and retake this swing seat!**

My support of the president and my conservative platform of protecting our guns, protecting life, securing the border, and reigning in out of control spending was a major reason I won the Republican primary in March.

Conservative Trump voters in my district voted for me with a whopping 77% of the vote! I won more than 30,000 primary votes in this district - **we are on fire for the President and ready to flip this seat!**

There are many people coming on board with my campaign. I have already been endorsed by _Congressman Mark Walker, Congressman Ted Budd, and Congressman Mark Meadows_. Here is a picture of me and Mark Meadows. Congressman Meadows used to be Chairman of the Freedom Caucus, and now he is the President Trump’s Chief of Staff in the White House. He “proudly endorsed” me shortly before his promotion, which I was so honored!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEZdBI_.QpNxmng&b=BK3Nh2JdlerWmIECMirIPw)
---

_The Congressman whose district I was redrawn into, Democrat G.K. Butterfield, is a high-level Democrat in Nancy Pelosi’s congressional socialist army_. He is one of her top lieutenants, and before that, he was a top campaigner for Hillary Clinton against Donald Trump. Taking out Butterfield will deal a massive blow to the anti-American far-left socialist agenda.
[ ](secure.anedot.com/sandysmithforcongress/st)
---

I am also honored to have been endorsed by the National Association of Gun Rights and Americans for Legal Immigration PAC. **They recognize me as being a staunch defender of our Second Amendment rights and opposing open borders!**

With the way President Trump has masterfully handled the Russia hoax, the impeachment hoax, and now the Coronavirus, he will be reelected in a landslide. The Fake News is begging him to stop his nightly press conferences that are getting him higher approval numbers than any president in recent history.

That’s why I’m running. President Trump has accomplished so much with constant pushback from the socialists. _Imagine what he can do with a supportive Congress!_

First, the Never-Trumper Republican establishment - Mitt Romney and Paul Ryan, the “Surrender Caucus”- fought against the President’s attempts to get government out of our Health Care.

Then, Nancy Pelosi and the revenge-driven Democrats started pushing for open borders and higher taxes, a page right out of the Communist Manifesto and implemented by the Soviet Union!

Can you believe this?!? I can’t! That’s why [I’m asking for your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEZdBI_.QpNxmng&b=BK3Nh2JdlerWmIECMirIPw) most urgently! Please send whatever amount you can spare to get me over the finish line.

**It is so crucial that we take advantage of every chance we have to flip a swing district** \- which North Carolina’s First District now is! They just redrew the map and took away a bunch of Democrat voters, making this district MUCH more competitive.

[ ](secure.anedot.com/sandysmithforcongress/st)
---

As a top anti-Trump attack dog for Pelosi and Hillary, G.K. Butterfield has been responsible for the worst assaults on our Constitution the radical activist Democrat Congress has proposed:

• _G. K. Butterfield just voted for the impeachment coup of arguably one of the greatest presidents our nation has elected. He voted for impeachment, not for any crime, but for political differences. _

• _He supports gun confiscation, socialized medicine, and abortion on demand up until birth. He actually voted for all of these! This makes me so angry!_

_• Butterfield voted for open borders, allowing for the Coronavirus and other diseases and crime to flood out country. He doesn’t want a wall and wants to let criminal illegal aliens stay here indefinitely – and give them handouts, voting rights, and free college!_

_• He wants ICE abolished and hates our brave law enforcement officers! This is straight up anti-American!_

_• G.K. Butterfield votes nearly 100% of the time with Nancy Pelosi. I will vote nearly 0% of the time with Nancy Pelosi! She will be terrified when she loses her top lieutenant when he is defeated in November._

As mentioned above, G. K. Butterfield just voted for the impeachment coup of arguably one of the greatest presidents our nation has elected. Yet, read an excerpt from this explanation of why he voted to impeach President Trump. **He called President Trump a domestic enemy!**

“ _President Trump put himself before country and violated his oath of office. The oath I took is clear— I have sworn to support and defend the Constitution against _**all enemies, foreign and domestic**_. Based on the evidence before us, _**I voted in favor of both Articles of Impeachment against Donald J. Trump.**_ No one is above the law_.” – G.K. Butterfield

Why is Butterfield so radical and why does he hate President Trump so much?

_Before this year, he has never had a credible challenger!_

But this year, this district turned into a swing district. **Half of the district has never been represented by Butterfield**. They don’t know him, and they are Republicans!

With President Trump having such high favorability, and with my decisive primary win of 77%, and the fact that do-nothing Butterfield has never had a real opponent, we are going to WIN!

[Will you help me beat Butterfield and deprive Nancy Pelosi of a reliable vote?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEZdBI_.QpNxmng&b=BK3Nh2JdlerWmIECMirIPw) I need you to send $15, $35, or $250 right now so that I can meet my goal by the end of this month. This deadline is so critical, and I have no time to lose.

You already know where I stand and that I will deliver on every important vote.... always! I won't waiver!

**_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

We only need 18 seats to retake Congress. Can you picture what Congress would look like without Nancy Pelosi?

Think about it:

_No impeachment. No tax hikes. No socialized medicine. No stifling regulations. No gun confiscations. No infanticide. No gotcha or pork-barrel addons to bills._

To me, THAT’S a future we can agree on! _That’s keeping America great_.

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEZdBI_.QpNxmng&b=BK3Nh2JdlerWmIECMirIPw), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a leftist extremist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEZdBI_.QpNxmng&b=BK3Nh2JdlerWmIECMirIPw). I appreciate you and thank you.

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEZdBI_.QpNxmng&b=BK3Nh2JdlerWmIECMirIPw)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEZdBI_.QpNxmng&b=BK3Nh2JdlerWmIECMirIPw)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEZdBI_.QpNxmng&b=BK3Nh2JdlerWmIECMirIPw) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dean=20Browning?=
subject: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller: Chapter 5: “Setting The Record Straight.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BROWNING FOR CONGRESS**
body:
|
---
| |
---
| ,

It seems I have ruffled Lisa Scheller’s feathers as she is once again gasping for air while **she LIES ABOUT MY RECORD AS COUNTY COMMISSIONER.**

In 2010, Lehigh County faced a scenario for the upcoming year (2011), where the County would have been left without any reserves. As a result, in September 2010, the County Executive submitted a budget for 2011 that called for a tax increase of $13 million or 16%.

Right before the legal deadline to vote on that budget, some on the board demanded that the County Executive “redo” and resubmit a flat budget, but none of them offered even a single spending cut to make that happen. It was a Washington, D.C. - style gimmick, and I opposed it.

Following that, an alternate budget prepared by the Commissioners with a 13% increase failed to garner enough votes to be approved, so the original budget with the 16% increase went into effect “by default,” and without an up or down vote \- a quirk of the County’s Home Rule Charter.

Here is what _The Morning Call _had to say about my record on taxes the last time I was attacked for my fiscally conservative stance:

__**"No one did more on the Lehigh County commissioners than Browning did over his career to hold taxes down**_ "_ \- _May 8, 2018_

_**_“Browning never voted in favor of the [tax] hike,"_** \- May 16, 2018_

So why is Lying Lisa Scheller being deceitful and lying to the voters about my record?

It is because Lying Lisa Scheller is the only person in this race who voted to raise taxes.

**_If you live in Lehigh County, pull out your County tax bill for 2014, and you will see that it is 3% higher than it was in 2013._**

To illustrate this point, I have included a redacted version of **_my own tax bills_**. Please see _**Figure 1**_ at the bottom of this email. You can clearly see the increase in taxes I paid from 2013 to 2014.

Every taxpayer in Lehigh County saw the exact same increase.

_**This lovely tax increase is all thanks to Lisa Scheller’s yes vote as County Commissioner.**_

Yet Lying Lisa Scheller, a pure Establishment swamp rat, told the National Republican Congressional Committee that during her four years as Lehigh County Commissioner, she “successfully led efforts to cut taxes every year.”

I do not care about the Washington Establishment.

_I care about the constituents of my district, and I plan to be elected based on my own merits and voting record._

This is just another example of the lengths Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller will go to lie about me, lie about her record, and say anything to get in with Washington’s Swamp.

We cannot let her win on June 2, 2020!!

**We need a TRUE CONSERVATIVE who wants to WORK FOR THE PEOPLE OF LEHIGH VALLEY! Not a career politician who only cares about their own self-gain!**

I hope this helps to set the record straight and show that I am only one candidate who will for the interests of the American People.

Tune in next week for another chapter in the __Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller.__

**For Freedom,**
---
| |
---
| **Dean Browning
Conservative Republican for Congress, PA-07**

P.S. ~ Did you see Lying Lisa Scheller touting her support from the NRCC?
She has gone so far as to blatantly lie about her record in cutting taxes when the facts speak differently: **She voted for and approved a budget that caused Lehigh County taxpayers to pay more in 2014 than they did in 2013. We cannot let her win on June 2, 2020!!**
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=d4bab5775f&e=6800876418 "DONATE NOW!")
---
| __**Figure 1**__
It is votes like these that hurt the people of our district. We cannot let Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller win on June 2, 2020.

|
---

name: MJ Hegar
subject: [RESPONSE NEEDED] Health care survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489006b/7f51f7bc/4e4e21a3/4ef6b353/80347247/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Especially now, Peter, health care is at the front of every Texan's mind. We've been talking for months about how Texas is the most uninsured state in the country and how we need to implement a public option so that everyone can get the health care they need.

And right now we're seeing the cracks in our health system and how wide they become when we face a crisis. **Roughly 27 million people have likely lost employer-based health coverage since COVID-19 shocked the economy. [Will you take my brief health care survey to let me know what you think we should do to fix our health care system?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489006b/7f51f7bc/4e4e21a3/4ef6b352/80347247/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/mj-hcsurveyrs")**

Despite Sen. Cornyn's attempts to eliminate the Affordable Care Act, it's still standing strong. It's still protecting people with pre-existing conditions, allowing young adults to stay on their parents' health care plans until 26, and expanding access to coverage for people across America.

**But it 's clear we need to do more. I want to know what you think about how we can improve our health care system. Will you take my brief survey about the future of health care in America?** **[**TAKE MJ'S HEALTH CARE SURVEY**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489006b/7f51f7bc/4e4e21a3/4ef6b352/80347247/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/mj-hcsurveyrs")** We've seen just how unprepared our health care system is for a massive pandemic like COVID-19. It's obvious that change is necessary to protect ourselves and ensure that everyone has the quality, affordable care they deserve. **We can 't fix our health care without leaders who listen to us, and put public health before the special interests.**

\-- MJ

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489006b/7f51f7bc/4e4e21a3/4ef6b351/80347247/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200515.1db__1438__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489006b/7f51f7bc/4e4e21a3/4ef6b350/80347247/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1438&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489006b/7f51f7bc/4e4e21a3/4ef6b357/80347247/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

clean_body: | "" | | Especially now, Peter, health care is at the front of every Texan's mind. We've been talking for months about how Texas is the most uninsured state in the country and how we need to implement a public option so that everyone can get the health care they need. And right now we're seeing the cracks in our health system and how wide they become when we face a crisis. Roughly 27 million people have likely lost employer-based health coverage since COVID-19 shocked the economy. "" Despite Sen. Cornyn's attempts to eliminate the Affordable Care Act, it's still standing strong. It's still protecting people with pre-existing conditions, allowing young adults to stay on their parents' health care plans until 26, and expanding access to coverage for people across America. But it 's clear we need to do more. I want to know what you think about how we can improve our health care system. Will you take my brief survey about the future of health care in America? "" We've seen just how unprepared our health care system is for a massive pandemic like COVID-19. It's obvious that change is necessary to protect ourselves and ensure that everyone has the quality, affordable care they deserve. We can 't fix our health care without leaders who listen to us, and put public health before the special interests. \-- MJ "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. #
Adam Kinzinger is a hawk, and his foreign policy is dangerous.

Since the outset of the coronavirus pandemic, he’s lambasted the Chinese government, called for punitive measures, trotted out racist tweets, and promoted xenophobia.
---
| [Click here to help defeat Adam Kinzinger](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=356cc0d385&e=140a9b81e7 "Click here to help defeat Adam Kinzinger")
---
| And last week, he was named to the White House’s “China Task Force”. This task force, charged with the task of determining how the US government should hold China accountable, is a farce. Populated entirely by Republican lawmakers, the task force is likely to encourage a single-mindedness that is a danger to us all. Kinzinger occasionally enjoys a reputation as critical of President Trump.**The fact is that he votes with the Trump agenda 95% of the time** and his breaks with the President’s policies tend to be the moments when Trump’s rash decisions interfere with Kinzinger’s desire to embroil the United States further in foreign conflicts. **Kinzinger’s foreign policy is dangerous** and his time in Congress represents a risk to the American people and to prospects for peace all around the globe**. ** But we have a plan. The plan is to replace him with me, Dani Brzozowski. **As the daughter of a Gulf War veteran, I understand the sacrifices made by soldiers and their families and approach foreign policy from a diplomacy-first standpoint. ** We need competent, compassionate leadership in Congress, and I need your help to get there. [Can you commit to a $10, $15, or $20 donation to our campaign?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=dac126cc0e&e=140a9b81e7)

body:
We didn't think that it was real either, but it is. Joe Biden is supposedly gaining rapid momentum in battleground states across the country, finally proving that he really is the Democrats' "best option" to beat President Trump in November.
_Senator Todd Young is a fifth generation Hoosier whose commanding victory in 2016 led him to join the Senate Republican Majority.

Todd brings years of leadership experience from his background as a US Naval Academy graduate and a Marine. Todd's commitment to protecting conservative values and policies includes his fight for fiscal responsibility and America-first Foreign Affairs legislation. As a leading conservative voice in Washington, Todd simply wants to make government work better for his fellow Hoosiers and Americans nationwide.

This year, however, Todd's main priority is to defend Senate Republicans in battleground elections nationwide and he needs **YOU** to help him in this fight. _
---

Friend,
We didn't think that it was real either, but it is. Joe Biden is supposedly gaining rapid momentum in battleground states across the country, finally proving that he really is the Democrats' "best option" to beat President Trump in November.

name: John Cornyn
subject: I’m assembling my core group of supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc
body:
Friend,

We've been in touch for a while now, but with a real opponent now in this race, things are getting very serious.

From this very moment on until the November 2020 election, we'll have to compete with Hollywood elites, the Democrat establishment in Washington, and Texas own far-left liberals pumping support (and cash) into my opponent's campaign.

That's why I want to make this official. We have a serious battle to fight, and I need to make sure my closest supporters are with me.

So, as our campaign kicks into high gear, I'm assembling my core group of supporters,**my Founding Members** those who will be with me from this moment on, until election day.

I wanted to personally invite you to be a member of that team: [**A Founding Member.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lVqjuNIFbFrPFMz_R4o8PYlqlU9N0NG4B4kGCPX-wIeNG8C-BLmtpbFRc9pXoT0bDsN1a6msqNAoqKtUl6eJqR9gig7h-vENz3wLIXEzVizpJwyeaT77d9etlVPPymmtk4kRRRTbUUGZOPQTd62iwjI00JRURPcQ36gPcCbfmEj9DcN1pfe3mRi2BL0pF6mD7WGfIAsaS68rlT82a2fb4wxxSywKPFJfaPCxNV0REEXKSm7mqCxqfNyhoU0OzzfkkRmhymb0kEPGdYD5srW37AxsyqsfY8nAmcAgj5S1uJ2bbmeoPkn44fmUDgXV5JZs_hBEnPlarOd1jRy-dnYNccrjL9kVvra9ogpn2r98IXM=&c=160uSAeuOHc0tg7by2M1p9G6P_tW7jJEoUEdDISkEXKYictc4aDPnQ==&ch=R4M5ToJNK9qb9unKjknkj_ahMF_YSoee7w1L4dAZ01tcx9aLW6A-6g==)

FOUNDING MEMBER OFFER

Status: **PENDING**

**#KeepTexasRed** | **[UPDATE STATUS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lVqjuNIFbFrPFMz_R4o8PYlqlU9N0NG4B4kGCPX-wIeNG8C-BLmtpbFRc9pXoT0bDsN1a6msqNAoqKtUl6eJqR9gig7h-vENz3wLIXEzVizpJwyeaT77d9etlVPPymmtk4kRRRTbUUGZOPQTd62iwjI00JRURPcQ36gPcCbfmEj9DcN1pfe3mRi2BL0pF6mD7WGfIAsaS68rlT82a2fb4wxxSywKPFJfaPCxNV0REEXKSm7mqCxqfNyhoU0OzzfkkRmhymb0kEPGdYD5srW37AxsyqsfY8nAmcAgj5S1uJ2bbmeoPkn44fmUDgXV5JZs_hBEnPlarOd1jRy-dnYNcSYam1JbDDMNB5GIX_-3SXc=&c=160uSAeuOHc0tg7by2M1p9G6P_tW7jJEoUEdDISkEXKYictc4aDPnQ==&ch=R4M5ToJNK9qb9unKjknkj_ahMF_YSoee7w1L4dAZ01tcx9aLW6A-6g==)**
---

Before you accept, however, I want to make sure you know what kind of responsibility comes with being recognized as a Founding Member.

First, I will need your ear. I'll need to run ideas by you, get your feedback, and ask your opinion on how things are going on the ground.

Second, I'll be keeping you in the loop on exclusive updates. Whether it's a polling memo or key information on my opponent, I need you to be on alert for confidential updates.

Finally, I'll need you to keep me informed on anything you hear and see related to our race.

Friend, I'm placing my trust in you.

[**Will you accept my offer to become a Founding Member of this campaign?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lVqjuNIFbFrPFMz_R4o8PYlqlU9N0NG4B4kGCPX-wIeNG8C-BLmtpbFRc9pXoT0bDsN1a6msqNAoqKtUl6eJqR9gig7h-vENz3wLIXEzVizpJwyeaT77d9etlVPPymmtk4kRRRTbUUGZOPQTd62iwjI00JRURPcQ36gPcCbfmEj9DcN1pfe3mRi2BL0pF6mD7WGfIAsaS68rlT82a2fb4wxxSywKPFJfaPCxNV0REEXKSm7mqCxqfNyhoU0OzzfkkRmhymb0kEPGdYD5srW37AxsyqsfY8nAmcAgj5S1uJ2bbmeoPkn44fmUDgXV5JZs_hBEnPlarOd1jRy-dnYNcQpJh-kdyHQF6veSdpPIOAc=&c=160uSAeuOHc0tg7by2M1p9G6P_tW7jJEoUEdDISkEXKYictc4aDPnQ==&ch=R4M5ToJNK9qb9unKjknkj_ahMF_YSoee7w1L4dAZ01tcx9aLW6A-6g==)
****[BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lVqjuNIFbFrPFMz_R4o8PYlqlU9N0NG4B4kGCPX-wIeNG8C-BLmtpbFRc9pXoT0bDsN1a6msqNAoqKtUl6eJqR9gig7h-vENz3wLIXEzVizpJwyeaT77d9etlVPPymmtk4kRRRTbUUGZOPQTd62iwjI00JRURPcQ36gPcCbfmEj9DcN1pfe3mRi2BL0pF6mD7WGfIAsaS68rlT82a2fb4wxxSywKPFJfaPCxNV0REEXKSm7mqCxqfNyhoU0OzzfkkRmhymb0kEPGdYD5srW37AxsyqsfY8nAmcAgj5S1uJ2bbmeoPkn44fmUDgXV5JZs_hBEnPlarOd1jRy-dnYNccBUDvrV8imi0mZz16sQ44M=&c=160uSAeuOHc0tg7by2M1p9G6P_tW7jJEoUEdDISkEXKYictc4aDPnQ==&ch=R4M5ToJNK9qb9unKjknkj_ahMF_YSoee7w1L4dAZ01tcx9aLW6A-6g==)****
---
Friend, this race is going to be long. It's going to be hotly contested. I need to know that you're on my team from the very beginning, and will be until the very end.

In order to ensure that our Founding Member group includes only the most engaged supporters, your offer will expire soon. Take immediate action to reserve your spot in the exclusive group.

Thank you, Friend. Your support means everything.

Senator John Cornyn

Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc.
---
With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lVqjuNIFbFrPFMz_R4o8PYlqlU9N0NG4B4kGCPX-wIeNG8C-BLmtpXs_pfQL-XzbV5I_l7M4xC5pV8tJHu4yA9pgdKLdO241NjbypgSm81NvUDau6Hn7VBCrEToXa1NhGDVSNaCfOLTqHhA_7iPLJowdMOdCDLb-_SvpEVpLwh0=&c=160uSAeuOHc0tg7by2M1p9G6P_tW7jJEoUEdDISkEXKYictc4aDPnQ==&ch=R4M5ToJNK9qb9unKjknkj_ahMF_YSoee7w1L4dAZ01tcx9aLW6A-6g==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lVqjuNIFbFrPFMz_R4o8PYlqlU9N0NG4B4kGCPX-wIeNG8C-BLmtpXs_pfQL-XzbqMgnwjMmI5KIrbdvD_AGJxH2zkP2eyGvVEkiaO4tSQ_chZ-2P5NlzXSqmX3w-7cdJEs4BtrEKJWXcXjkuHfyN4ynnTFfZcwr&c=160uSAeuOHc0tg7by2M1p9G6P_tW7jJEoUEdDISkEXKYictc4aDPnQ==&ch=R4M5ToJNK9qb9unKjknkj_ahMF_YSoee7w1L4dAZ01tcx9aLW6A-6g==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're _really_ ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lVqjuNIFbFrPFMz_R4o8PYlqlU9N0NG4B4kGCPX-wIeNG8C-BLmtpXs_pfQL-XzbhkVVxC3PMiHy8Nat6Zn80Oj3Foafj__bL6SKNBhSAg7g3eTfbxyj_wBnD2Lbw7w3mezNt_sQJ66SekYn52HvB1beeaU_Qnzv7C1dOQ-do1KhI50j5rkTQA==&c=160uSAeuOHc0tg7by2M1p9G6P_tW7jJEoUEdDISkEXKYictc4aDPnQ==&ch=R4M5ToJNK9qb9unKjknkj_ahMF_YSoee7w1L4dAZ01tcx9aLW6A-6g==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lVqjuNIFbFrPFMz_R4o8PYlqlU9N0NG4B4kGCPX-wIeNG8C-BLmtpSG7aa5CMooOvZswDiu1C_YhDEFffXAH0aowgN6cuo4Eta72XTWOzRcCRg9vxq0EtRA_fautZTfgRJt-RYlKWO-XoELGGYXdAsKE4iF8AhhGpBwIae2EHWPVZ4NAd2RyDXFIycHu8qXRcjGQpRTAivohk3XHTxUtGEgzcdsPR9divo9oOQ70TQfHq_4A_yn24jOIgmyu0mj-1TCDuQKruopEsIwxoivmWwxvlRR-pLq8Awzuk3xT__LjypbDKKfoHA==&c=160uSAeuOHc0tg7by2M1p9G6P_tW7jJEoUEdDISkEXKYictc4aDPnQ==&ch=R4M5ToJNK9qb9unKjknkj_ahMF_YSoee7w1L4dAZ01tcx9aLW6A-6g==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax deductible.

subject: RE: Can you help us order more Ashley Hinson for Congress yard signs?

body:
We have reserved hundreds of signs for our loyal volunteers and it already looks like we'll need to make another order in a week or two
Friend,

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
Hey there, did you get a chance to see our new TV ad that went live yesterday? In case you missed it, check it out here!
_Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating.

And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue._
---

Hey there, Friend, did you get a chance to see our new TV ad that went live yesterday? In case you missed it, check it out by clicking below:
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SP8M8q6RwTH9qSTHybXxgRvmi0D-6HeIGV8IR3cJf3-TLfmfwDQlVuyHCSAIDS0Ojs51z3vo1ZypGljd3AIfAPMNyOFSW0ZF7GXlGH9KjAts-qBm9H5vf3erB3Fec6oSdBsmdZSQm5Y08Pt23-W_-oaGy2srQdK3CQ7NUqo6zh5Nu07tGdFeFdMKOKMkUXHp4G2ADbWxVKYakaOrcoxVqFo70293uLRbxCoThXozoPnye7WbYkBTUA0zSVK4A_-ScMhE0aJZEW2H1fzawY9-fK2GyIlGVbWsGtIk4jfxUWm9mLWnKuFoAxnR4G8jWdnUQVFeBacpXQSBIc1hAHlNQ3t91CzSRWM-sPasgYDFunJ8KuYJWcgDTnZt_3CrqPrSEPemugMzW0o0MSz6vNHFOQ==&c=bsFeG7U5w42PsY2W6qyXYmrnSbRPRTxOxQx3iFYgLWp0u2EInm1hNQ==&ch=5ywAc8rTLnGI_KJNeb5kiDqWBCPRFwvcQFVE6pUzCfWHVs2o9pgrYQ==)
We deserve strong, common-sense leaders like Cory who can reach across the aisle to provide **_real leadership_** for **_all Americans_** , especially here in Colorado. And in times of need, we know that we can count on leaders like Cory to deliver a common-sense, pro-growth agenda that uplifts Coloradans, their small businesses, their families, and their communities.

Make sure to forward the ad to your friends and family to help Team Gardner in their fight for Cory's proven leadership!

Thanks for your support, Friend, and for standing with Cory and our team in this year's most critical Senate battleground election.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Democrats just passed ANOTHER stimulus
body:
|
---
| |
---
| Peter,

I wish I were exaggerating when I say that the Democrats want to destroy our economy beyond repair, but their recently-passed HEROES Act does just that. This joke of a stimulus bill includes tax cuts for Blue State Millionaires, financial aid to illegal immigrants, $72 billion for vague “contact tracing” measures, and sweeping changes to voting procedures that give Nancy Pelosi unprecedented power. The price tag is a whopping $3 trillion, with the intention to borrow all of it from China. Over 38 million Americans are now unemployed due to the dictatorial-like shutdowns we’ve seen across the nation. Unsurprisingly, the democrat’s focus is on grabbing more power and pandering for votes rather than working with Republicans to safely reopen the economy and restore the livelihoods of millions of Americans. Democrat politicians have shown their true colors now more than ever. If they were truly “for the people,” they would be working hard to revive the economy and protect the rights of their citizens. Instead Pelosi and her cronies are using this crisis to further their radical socialist agenda at the expense of American lives. Left unchecked by Republicans in the Senate, Democrats would eliminate our borders, kill our Bill of Rights, and suffocate the American spirit of innovation and freedom. We must preserve our Republican Seat in the Senate. Kansas Republicans must chose a candidate that can unite the party and defeat Barbara Bollier. I am running to do just that. My favorability rating is higher than Kobach’s and Marshall’s, but most importantly, in a race against Bollier we Republicans have a clear path to victory. The stakes for November 2020 have never been higher. We can’t let America slide towards socialism and lose our precious freedoms. I promise to fight for your safety and your liberty. Join me in this fight by making a small donation to my campaign today. For the real heroes, Dave Lindstrom
---

name: Bill Olson
subject: I Will Stop Pelosi and Soto ASAP 🔥
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gRskW9hEH_6OuRU&b=OCLN4_oN.MwsEj2nDjmpCw

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by embattled liberal Democrat Darren Soto.

I received an additional Army Commendation Medal for my meritorious service in liberating Kuwait during Operation Desert Shield and Operation Desert Storm, and in 2008 I was awarded the Bronze Star for exceptionally meritorious service during the global war on terror in Afghanistan. Here is my award:

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gRskW9hEH_6OuRU&b=OCLN4_oN.MwsEj2nDjmpCw

So you can imagine, being an Army lifer, that serving my country - protecting my country and our freedoms - is a VERY big deal to me!

I am NOT a career politician.... Just someone who spent most of his adult life, risking my life for your freedom.

And seeing what Nancy Pelosi and Darren Soto- career politicians both- are pulling on the country is more than I can bear!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gRskW9hEH_6OuRU&b=OCLN4_oN.MwsEj2nDjmpCw

You may have seen that Pelosi's Democrats - like Soto - went too far, trying to “never let a crisis go to waste”.

Nancy Pelosi fiddled while the country's economy burned. As over 20 million Americans went on unemployment because the country's economy arrested due to the Coronavirus crisis, Pelosi and Soto saw fit to play partisan games with the American people:

In a call that included 200 members of the House Democratic caucus Thursday, lawmakers brainstormed their progressive non-COVID-19-related wish list to be included in the COVID-19 relief bill. Their ideas spanned increased Social Security benefits, extra funding for infrastructure, and in the event the Wuhan virus stretches into the November election timeline, funding for state-run, all-mail voting programs.

“This is a tremendous opportunity to restructure things to fit our vision,” Majority Whip James Clyburn, D-S.C., said to the caucus members, according to a source on the call.

As millions of Americans struggle to make ends meet and look to their elected officials for direction and hope, House Democrats remain steadfast in their opposition to President Donald Trump and the rest of the GOP and in their dedication to pushing a radical progressive policy agenda, no matter the cost to their hurting constituents.

This Coronavirus is the Democrats' dream. They get to spend government money like monopoly money, on "priorities" like illegal immigrants, the Kennedy Center, on Harvard University, on the Green New Deal.... and NOT on helping Americans who desperately need help.

Understand, that government intentionally caused harm to people by shutting down the country’s economy to fight the Wuhan Virus. So President Trump was trying to help the American people get by.

But Nancy wouldn’t let him!

And Darren Soto? He released the most partisan, hate-filled screed to line right up behind anti-American Nancy Pelosi:

As if his mishandling of the U.S. coronavirus response wasn’t bad enough, President Donald Trump has now called for steep bailouts for multinational corporations affected by the coronavirus. This goes too far. The Republicans already hindered our ability to respond to an economic crisis by doubling our national deficit to $1 trillion with their ill-conceived 2017 tax cuts to big businesses and the wealthiest Americans during what was then a good economy.

These extremists only want a dishonest way to enact their unpopular agenda- except, it's not cheap, their agenda is REALLY unpopular, and they didn't want to do ANYTHING to help the average American suffering because of the Coronavirus crisis.

This is all part of the Democrats' War on America. They want to help their Socialist buddies and make life bad for you. Can you help me stop them?

I’m a fighter and I love my country and my fellow citizens! I have been fighting for America my whole adult life.

Now I want to take that fighting spirit to Congress- and Nancy Pelosi and her band of Socialists like Darren Soto don’t stand a chance.

Liberal Democrat Darren Soto did not serve in the military. Instead, he votes with AOC and her anti-American "Squad" over 95% of the time!

Soto is Nancy Pelosi's lap dog - he sold his voting card to her a long time ago!

What really upsets me is that Soto's Democrats went all-in on impeaching the President. They have become SO radicalized, they impeached the President for nothing more than political payback!

-Because they were off pursuing their vicious impeachment fantasies, they left the country ill prepared for the Wuhan Virus breakout.

-When President Trump cut off travel to and from China, they called him a racist!

-And now, when he stops immigration completely so that we may recover, they call him a “fascist”.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gRskW9hEH_6OuRU&b=OCLN4_oN.MwsEj2nDjmpCw

I say, ENOUGH! This man has done nothing but look out for the American People, and all the Dems do is obstruct and call names!

I think those who have laid the most on the line for our country and its citizens- whose who have taken an Oath to defend the Constitution- are the ones best fit to defend our Constitution in Congress.

Me, I’m not a career politician. I don't have fancy refrigerators full of $15 designer ice cream, like Nancy Pelosi.

I earned my education in the Cold War frontiers of Germany and South Korea, as well as the battlefields of Kuwait, Iraq, and Afghanistan. That's why I'm 100% behind the President's "America First" policies!

Let's be clear- there is NO Republican win in 2020 without Florida.

Florida is so pivotal. The electoral votes, along with so many Republican-leaning and swing congressional districts, make this state of paramount importance. Plus, it's now President Trump's home state!

Perhaps you agree with me, that we need more Bible, more Constitution- and less crazy liberal Democrats like Darren Soto.

If so, then I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gRskW9hEH_6OuRU&b=OCLN4_oN.MwsEj2nDjmpCw

Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President!

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gRskW9hEH_6OuRU&b=OCLN4_oN.MwsEj2nDjmpCw

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gRskW9hEH_6OuRU&b=OCLN4_oN.MwsEj2nDjmpCw
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I need whatever you can send so we can defeat socialist Darren Soto!

The Democrats are going to lose this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gRskW9hEH_6OuRU&b=OCLN4_oN.MwsEj2nDjmpCw

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gRskW9hEH_6OuRU&b=OCLN4_oN.MwsEj2nDjmpCw

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gRskW9hEH_6OuRU&b=OCLN4_oN.MwsEj2nDjmpCw
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gRskW9hEH_6OuRU&b=OCLN4_oN.MwsEj2nDjmpCw
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

Marlton NJ 08053

name: Team Warner
subject: Your Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d483/53d9897e/54e63964/1c887537/1207686608/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

Team Warner hopes that you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy. We are committed to sending weekly updates to keep folks around the Commonwealth up to date with what Mark Warner is working on in the Senate to get Virginians the help they need during this challenging time.

**Here 's just some of what Mark is working on this week: **
* Mark and Tim Kaine joined 40 of their Senate colleagues to introduce the _Emergency Educational Connections Act_ , which would **[ensure that all students have reliable internet access, regardless of their ZIP code](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d483/53d9897e/54e63964/1c887536/1207686608/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wdbj7.com/content/news/Kaine-and-Warner-introduce-student-internet-access-legislation-during-COVID-19-crisis-570412421.html")**. This bill would help schools and libraries afford connectivity resources to support students and teachers during this period of distance learning.

* Mark is working with Sen. Lamar Alexander and a bipartisan group of senators to **[support rural hospitals that are struggling during the pandemic](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d483/53d9897e/54e63964/1c887535/1207686608/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://wvva.com/2020/05/08/warner-alexander-introduce-legislation-to-help-rural-hospitals-stay-open/")**. Their proposed legislation, the _Fair Medicare Hospitals Repayments Act_ would ensure that rural hospitals are reimbursed for their services by the federal government and provide help to at least 14 hospitals in Virginia.

* Mark co-sponsored Sen. Harris's _VoteSafe Act_ , which would **[expand early voting and vote-by-mail options nationwide](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d483/53d9897e/54e63964/1c887534/1207686608/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://thehill.com/homenews/senate/493138-kamala-harris-introduces-sweeping-5-billion-measure-to-enhance-voter-safety")**. Virginia already has expanded voting access, and Mark is committed to making sure that every American has the right to safely cast their ballot in November.

* Mark is working on a bill to **[protect miners during the coronavirus pandemic](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d483/53d9897e/54e63964/1c887533/1207686608/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://wvva.com/2020/05/14/manchin-durbin-kaine-brown-casey-capito-warner-introduce-bill-to-protect-miners-from-covid-19-exposure/")** with the support of Senate colleagues on both sides of the aisle. Their bill, the _COVID-19 Mine Worker Protection Act_ , would require additional health and safety precautions for miners who may have been exposed to the virus, and includes protection from retaliation for miners reporting infection control issues.

* Mark co-sponsored the _Public Health Emergency Privacy Act_ , which aims to **[protect the private health data of consumers](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d483/53d9897e/54e63964/1c887532/1207686608/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cnbc.com/2020/05/14/democrats-propose-bill-to-protect-health-data-used-for-contact-tracing.html")** during efforts to slow and stop the spread of coronavirus. The bill focuses on digital contact tracing technology, one tactic used to monitor the spread of this virus.

* Mark continues to advocate for his _Paycheck Security Act_ , which would **[protect paychecks and access to health care for workers](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d483/53d9897e/54e63964/1c887531/1207686608/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.nbc12.com/2020/05/13/senator-mark-warner-pushes-paycheck-security-program/")** who have been laid off or furloughed during this pandemic.

As our country faces this challenging time, Mark is committed to rolling up his sleeves and working until every American has the benefits they need. He's also committed to keeping his constituents informed about what he's working on and to hearing their feedback. He's holding a virtual town hall event next Monday at 5:45 pm ET. You can **[sign up here](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d483/53d9897e/54e63964/1c887530/1207686608/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/273790/")** if you're interested in participating. This event is free and open to all -- you do not need a Facebook account to access this live stream.

Thank you for your support!

-- Team Warner
|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d483/53d9897e/54e63964/1c88753f/1207686608/VEsP/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com") Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d483/53d9897e/54e63964/1c88753e/1207686608/VEsHBQ/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
