name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Blood banks and food banks need our help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Here’s how you can join us as we rally around these community cornerstones that are always there for our Hoosiers in need. | | |
---|---|---
Friend,

_We’re inching closer step-by-step to fully reopening Indiana, but we need to stay vigilant in the fight against COVID-19._

We must keep in mind that the needs of Hoosiers are still as pressing as ever.

That’s why we’re so proud to see Hoosiers in all corners of the state rallying around two cornerstones of our communities – **blood banks and food banks** – by stepping up and making sure they have everything they need to give back to our neighbors in need.

Since the start of the pandemic, over 4,000 blood drives have been canceled nationwide. As elective surgeries resume across Indiana’s hospitals, the need for blood donation is crucial. **Supporting the[Versiti Blood Center of Indiana](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=995aa57454604e079e975ca7d49c7bc1&_e=QvxA_6kfi8frzYoYfN9LeZBGr8DIyir-YeQQ5iSRFx5q8jcPwpLcIM2l0Iuguq0uIcatUpjxPeZMjPmMfGBm0IAbW-V3WHRd9yJIRNeKuZi774UHdTqCivCm7tWhvjqDu7wqGK6YlQi1ehNPdbDl1BE3xXcmUEdnFl51st5zxGRvqm000cToUp2rzBvICmnaoYhIW7acSn0e0deri8j6KkZh5NQQms5fCnQPRcYNjvFQJSyzHRzonsjBhubfJVIOF2dgTBgaGEggbCtWbuYn3w4DAc1RIRcxgwi6g7w7ajnFcyJr3vmRj8c-qzyHOzH1rOOhrSMAxwfeT3idLosRav_Qvmq5bOzWSkEWJF5sdCh0Uyx21Lb6UuJntzzA5MzN) or the [American Red Cross Blood Services](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=995aa57454604e079e975ca7d49c7bc1&_e=QvxA_6kfi8frzYoYfN9LeWGRiF-TMADqsXzvcWkQvPjDRN5vLKvaKKLFNEp4Qa8R3DzkFEka6VEY7iVXjOhK2t8EUKc2p7-A9MOGWZ3ZA3g4KoHHMj_u-BwS4ASVD9pJ9adToZvd82_v32GMBTqj2VaHrm8xBV4oBKFGK7ilkO4Ffmc3tgg4lymwQrKsZ1HmjWqQTiRMIxjASPhyh8IPqKupIOD1mLg55nWbyh3I8xdqckpcCWmVCGw4TcH0_62a0XIOckb-eVBkaLXbBJXNYLYvkUCCt8Lf96Jy6k8jLta55PNZIO496yNRobh9QR1XBKPJvO-rlDJjqI2JUL1EWch9cou4U5o2msUsRaeeLgoFYvoyK0Bpquo0W7TtUQzA) are great ways to help our healthcare professionals while still staying safe.**
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=995aa57454604e079e975ca7d49c7bc1&_e=QvxA_6kfi8frzYoYfN9LedexzR2bfDpMQ3XNmmaWGzhIr3OVv-0pLxYUjP4br-dolLsX61YNXvn2XpycBCOz2CXr85RcsfcKi9nQfvDNcuQr1YAQKwqsK3F6PZarj0NgwqhOtzldtHDE1l3WzY7dDqCd4GwivkQaXniK2SImVAlaPk6awT8r5TPIEX7fiJpGCYeNx_nQhdEIMhP69i0kMmstkW4jKjT6icRuvOCVVelDzvR9OkvaQ2_jsJ8n5BaE5dJD05qgDqhkDcGYE-3Ua1kTNVHpA9b4pYfz8lNncWkvhgOArzHEE_fjPQSF5cXuYQNwlKSRPb5EAKl0hEe0kVsEEazue4_k_fC_yRMStIyVHXa-ORf4osYEAHyUEA2sTbR11kDgoCGlMpM_wyzBGyGKj2jGkx_f7mTW0KZOTwY%3D)
As COVID-19 continues to disrupt our supply chains, local food banks also need our help to keep stomachs full and spirits lifted across our state. **We’ve been blown away by the stories of generosity like the one below and can’t wait to see more.**
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=995aa57454604e079e975ca7d49c7bc1&_e=QvxA_6kfi8frzYoYfN9LedexzR2bfDpMQ3XNmmaWGzhIr3OVv-0pLxYUjP4br-doHBEYEv_Y2Y8ok3NOIlzQqfqM45mgbL2CYTy2iH6q72HRNOpl3HWB6tXRIlJ8dIbdNL-HXoFcmEk029OcVJqOqPwqZinZ8isUFUE7YNpXpLpWhEMS7J_SMzwKNfDD0pG3t-GXMcnVElgXT359aFz72n4_xBgQAooxPrynwN5aBQFmPRC08kvX5iwy-Ff0G0mF1RyPYw2YcFdkdLLSIGS7zegyuAc7AOf6SeKiE4SGhnDqdQ55sAuEv8G88SY9SXFrz3opYYRt7CPZYNpaMo0vDEC0PzB_SIt_6XDE3BPus7XoqpaZYlk6BSDiAtnEEHVVszdxz87REksk5-o3HszVy_-dOesZNVps1HyDI6l9OGM%3D)
We’ve come so far together, and we know that Hoosiers will continue to support each other moving forward as we work to defeat this challenge.

clean_body: Here’s how you can join us as we rally around these community cornerstones that are always there for our Hoosiers in need. | | | ---|---|--- Friend, We’re inching closer step-by-step to fully reopening Indiana, but we need to stay vigilant in the fight against COVID-19. We must keep in mind that the needs of Hoosiers are still as pressing as ever. That’s why we’re so proud to see Hoosiers in all corners of the state rallying around two cornerstones of our communities – blood banks and food banks – by stepping up and making sure they have everything they need to give back to our neighbors in need. Since the start of the pandemic, over 4,000 blood drives have been canceled nationwide. As elective surgeries resume across Indiana’s hospitals, the need for blood donation is crucial. Supporting the or the are great ways to help our healthcare professionals while still staying safe. As COVID-19 continues to disrupt our supply chains, local food banks also need our help to keep stomachs full and spirits lifted across our state. We’ve been blown away by the stories of generosity like the one below and can’t wait to see more. We’ve come so far together, and we know that Hoosiers will continue to support each other moving forward as we work to defeat this challenge. If you’d like to be a part of supporting our local blood banks and food banks, simply click on the links below. #INThisTogether, -Holcomb Crew | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. body:
With the Democrats pushing for the most radical liberal policies in American history, the 2020 election will be one of the most consequential elections in our nation's history. We can't let Democrats capture the White House and Senate.
Friend, don't be fooled...

Democrats are pushing for the most radical liberal agenda in our lifetime. The 2020 election will be one of the most consequential elections in our nation's history. Even Pres. Obama admits they've got the most left-wing nominee in his party's history. So, when you hear the mainstream media talk about Democrat "moderates," that means open borders, the Green New Deal, and other far-left Socialist policies.

**Democrats only need 4 Senate seats to take control of our last line of defense.** We can't let this happen. name: Martha McSally
subject: Read my story!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc
body:
My new book, Dare to Fly, is an exclusive look at the lessons I learned on my journey to breaking barriers in the sky and on the Senate floor - and I saved a signed copy just for you today.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PrVsY88255XA3U9BpT6FxSJ4bLLTgxX79C56suK7NmWPx5PllmCRPX7x-j2M9IkeAs3HHvv5UdAPtpC52CVdO3VxYXAn-f9yk3FG1ttdpVG-VK8jhrS1UjVuGdWdmTAw9ZKO_cX0PUTE68P-WNtcbitEu--EZYtys_QvOtFhBn9wOK_3fpJF5Ou_QT_Fl7ig-i0vqA19y5RC-P8uN5uKJPLNCl7ry189oZtSDmzmKfeKAHU4tYC3TfJqnie72t1_VK0t4VnpH-WU7u0pRaVQKLLSsWvq8jm4jI7A5PZ8xAHy2hXjMKlLs1YBeNevSGmR1slvVKZ5cGbsqRS8s4F3AXIPsYCSewvBXIgUMsOQdChOw8Ts1rl05J3qFlGHe8tn0Mbv8RsjMZwzFHzw7F_SOq65uiGD2_5z&c=BylhdIQ3_1px4U8TLUf7IcHf4-Ph2W_OF_xbGz5K2TTQYZQW5TzUcg==&ch=bfZJxEYF-RAx6uzcGYVm1a_wuqKh0njdbZlszcBiPyfyYZiYBs6idA==)
Friend, don't miss your chance to pre-order a SIGNED copy of my new book!

_**Dare to Fly**_ , is an exclusive look at the lessons I learned on my journey to breaking barriers - both in the sky and on the Senate floor. _**I saved a signed copy just for you, but we can only hold it today!**_ [**Chip in just $55 to help provide resources for our campaign and we will send you a SIGNED copy of my new book! **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PrVsY88255XA3U9BpT6FxSJ4bLLTgxX79C56suK7NmWPx5PllmCRPX7x-j2M9IkehLQmngvlZvPv04G5wemTnAnLH_babyk6kHQQRBw05riK7CZ_F_eGfTYWv5WS1m9I4jCvrMlyX4uW0vRBOc9FFGetebG6SG3PwQGWJemo_0tvOCvIKytIUPpAinxZzK11rBysMq2ZSKqPqatX42k2a3roxV4k2LjmoBiFU0CxcVYx96WNcDlGVXrYXfD2HmdrYjggSPALCV3ar43-evweESjJrhYQq1mtJ1B9a6jiqbf3QOX0LvTycgB2TU3vyE5gJh5CDf3IDxswZ81H9Cowrdb5Bei30crvj-9sN598lROMGR10m1rv-poBv2b5VSCJlVsmH1-nTRMX-i53dXHr5OweoR_bhZGh&c=BylhdIQ3_1px4U8TLUf7IcHf4-Ph2W_OF_xbGz5K2TTQYZQW5TzUcg==&ch=bfZJxEYF-RAx6uzcGYVm1a_wuqKh0njdbZlszcBiPyfyYZiYBs6idA==)
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PrVsY88255XA3U9BpT6FxSJ4bLLTgxX79C56suK7NmWPx5PllmCRPX7x-j2M9IkeVAxQ1fCVibAoiX0zLHkpPhddugcHOC39qTWS8MK0ec3MUhViBAjmfA4JUgNjwD-ZAsc1sqqYjdPd_c5whSR8KbyLdIgVpid5momqFr8aq5vmhvMZM_1Dlk8Lf49Zc8A9mCHC4lLcLJK502L8L-AVICvnIvgUB5SPJS7JXmT9icBsZdV39Cw8JdXTJo_bHHb87xTCUJCtyCaP6a11YFqckJNpEpmxxFb0CyBIjXLVNUG9sBALikkht_D4TRanOJpyK08Kju0T69ODqUcxseGiEjorQ-5JWb_-52TohbvCvJyvCDZHgSnWrFVxr0SGtxZGqEQe6YGVGAM037NRogZ7hEWhCyQ1mSjz&c=BylhdIQ3_1px4U8TLUf7IcHf4-Ph2W_OF_xbGz5K2TTQYZQW5TzUcg==&ch=bfZJxEYF-RAx6uzcGYVm1a_wuqKh0njdbZlszcBiPyfyYZiYBs6idA==)

As a top supporter, I thought you might enjoy a SIGNED copy of my new book. In it, you'll find a candid look at the challenges I have faced that made me stronger today - I hope it will inspire you to see adversity in a new light. Since I went to Washington to represent Arizona, I've been outspoken in standing up for what I believe. After reading my book, you will know exactly why!

[**With your gift of $55 more to keep Arizona and the Senate Majority RED, you will be sent a SIGNED copy of 'Dare to Fly'!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PrVsY88255XA3U9BpT6FxSJ4bLLTgxX79C56suK7NmWPx5PllmCRPX7x-j2M9IkeAaYxATMZaVGh7GSPdrBkQvLYCVTca5x13T17PwakZbjqj4VxjuWpU0fLoE6PnKexDfeDIx2UbVioYe9gba9NGB6BRCtMM91aJiF6jphylneI6_0-GvC2yeVie1fJHGTtfswwMvJl_UVoU5n9VIwqicOapIpNGOoO2clBQT94DjyEfIpYpu6qNV6Omqr867JDI8wyDOWhDFQLeK0XpC7nQ4upR9RomITFySax9-i9kiLiP7MiE7huotMXDtGDbPdm9NNUlkunqATq0cl5y7l6u9ynTO_XDPjY61aPMEWKHZTU3ZWBbLFhDAdvQFHzejglAGMm171m--_cqem-OPUrZQyj1BXm9PU6&c=BylhdIQ3_1px4U8TLUf7IcHf4-Ph2W_OF_xbGz5K2TTQYZQW5TzUcg==&ch=bfZJxEYF-RAx6uzcGYVm1a_wuqKh0njdbZlszcBiPyfyYZiYBs6idA==)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. I hope you enjoy!

In Service,

Martha McSally

name: Georgia Senate Update
subject: re: Stacey Abram's request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
We need your help to close this gap.
| | |
---
Friend, we were starting to think we were toast.

The GOP was raising MILLIONS to buy this Senate seat in Georgia, and our grassroots support wasn't where it needed to be to fight back.
**But then Stacey Abrams asked you to support this campaign to elect Reverend Warnock ... and donations SKYROCKETED!**
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7b8/288179be/b88b7f6/348ea2ea/2646651854/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjI1LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk225-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
But now we're up against another critical midnight deadline - and with time running out, we're still falling incredibly short of our $50,000 goal. We need Democrats like you to act NOW - **or else, we could lose our chance to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate. **
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can take back the Senate this November, and _The Washington Post_ __ says winning in Georgia is KEY - but we can only get it done by hitting every single fundraising goal.
Even with Kelly Loeffler (R) flooding this race with $20 million of her own fortune, polling now shows this race in a dead heat. **That 's why we're counting on you to follow Stacey's lead and chip in right now - before time runs out: [_Please, give $5 or more now - as much as you can spare - before midnight tonight to help us win this race, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate!_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7b8/288179be/b88b7f6/348ea2ea/2646651854/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjI1LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk225-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Friend,

Obamagate is the biggest political crime in our Nation’s history.

Barack Obama will forever be remembered as the disgraced former President who used federal law enforcement in an attempt to hurt his political opponents.

His administration, including Sleepy Joe Biden, “illegally spied” on President Trump and his 2016 campaign and then LIED about it - we can’t let them get away with it.

The President trusts what you think, which is why he’s asked us personally to reach out to you and get your thoughts on how he should proceed with handling the greatest HOAX of all time.

We’re sending the first 75 responses to our quick 1-question poll directly to the President’s phone for him to review.

name: Michelle De La Isla
subject: Thank you, Mayor Pete
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
I am so honored to have Mayor Pete's endorsement in my race for Kansas' 2nd District.

_Mayor De La Isla's number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends --

My first day at the New Mayor's School was like any other first day of school -- I was nervous about meeting new people and finding common ground with them. My first session that day was with Mayor Pete Buttigieg, and as you can imagine, I knew that this was a new friend. Not just because he is also a midwestern mayor whose constituents were facing many of the same challenges as mine were, but also because of the sincerity and poise he exhibited.

Mayor Pete's bold approach was inspiring -- his 1,000 homes in 1,000 days project alone was an incredible accomplishment! Pete always demonstrated what intellect married with compassion can do, which is why I was excited to endorse him for President. It's also why I am so honored to have his endorsement in my race for Kansas' 2nd District.

**[Will you stand with Pete and Win The Era by chipping in to help send me to Congress to fight for Kansans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17521352/197061352/-1952513085?gpsid=22_122_12980&refcode=em20_200516_pete2_fnd_gq_nopn_rs_MDLI_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200516_pete2_fnd_gq_nopn_rs_MDLI_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmNzZjNi1iMjk3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_ga7ok06jGRH50gS6-PZMkOlF4BE3payosRapnWLjs=)**

Being endorsed by Pete is humbling. The fact that he believes so much in us, to put his name behind this race is inspirational. The Win the Era PAC is supporting individuals who are running for office with values conducive to restoring our democracy and giving EVERYONE an equal voice.

I'm running to be a different kind of leader for our state. I understand the problems Kansans face, because I've faced them too. From being a young mother to experiencing homelessness to navigating the healthcare system -- the challenges I've faced have taught me to lead with compassion and determination.

But I can't do this alone. I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to step up and ensure this campaign has the resources it takes to send me to Congress to fight for you.

**[Can I count on your support? Donate $10 or more to stand with Win The Era, and help send me to Congress>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17521353/197061354/-1952513085?gpsid=22_122_12980&refcode=em20_200516_pete2_fnd_gq_nopn_rs_MDLI_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200516_pete2_fnd_gq_nopn_rs_MDLI_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmNzZjNi1iMjk3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_ga7ok06jGRH50gS6-PZMkOlF4BE3payosRapnWLjs=)**

Thank you,

Michelle

**Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can.**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17521354/197061356/-1952513085?gpsid=22_122_12980&refcode=em20_200516_pete2_fnd_gq_nopn_rs_MDLI_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200516_pete2_fnd_gq_nopn_rs_MDLI_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmNzZjNi1iMjk3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_ga7ok06jGRH50gS6-PZMkOlF4BE3payosRapnWLjs=)

PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
Michelle for Kansas
PO Box 67101
Topeka, KS 66667

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d835b378-ae97-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd/557f76c6-b297-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmNzZjNi1iMjk3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_ga7ok06jGRH50gS6-PZMkOlF4BE3payosRapnWLjs=&id=111940568&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

subject: fwd: This is our chance, friend

Did you see the last message from my team?
Friend, Did you see the last message from my team?
All we have to do is look at the current state of our Congress to see a clear picture of how Republicans and Democrats lead – or don’t lead.
Our Republican-led Senate has worked nonstop to provide relief and guidance for the American people during a time when they need it most.
**Meanwhile, Nancy Pelosi and other Democratic leaders in the House have continued to stall our efforts to get America back to work.**
This is exactly why we need a change of leadership in the House, and we have a chance to make it happen this November. Just look at the election results in Deep Blue California on Tuesday! Chip in below if you want to be a part of making that happen:
[**https://secure.winred.com/darinlahood/action-1210798**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=43a346c5dde44aa8b089c88312da1a54&_e=U1-SFWCPU0xvbbwSHzyDLsaosr34FBfXxjDT82MdLwwrSBChCcpsWNQgv3d-XAUB3Hb_mRmwOdKe-whqCguNLhJlQ8Z8244feaIlxqfOai26qLwSsdnv6-HdD6WBn2xdu0QDggomVaxGDdMxtezeHKtCq9Qfq6eOLrnHCMJ19UMPsWBWV8RcvmfZgCPb1QepOgL7y580pCHAPr1pBWY5UnRI135XnTalBqrm9G0a3YAdnLwdX3AGICsG3abE-94zrRL3HHWMK3UKClM4dqGD0EHTLdjyudfj3_t8D91TfPNcm62kmP4vFI0RVlK6xUX7diXTREdO6N7v1gP4_fSvIdvbH3Hl1GI8wqr8W3Z3NXpc5roKahKasO2e_HtUgdj-OHXc9gl2IxMmZbXfbVjzk-9IxmDvED_QZjbIIbY8qQG7LccsiyHpS9SlQHMer2FGsqRPbocaTILiy4vdEZ0hn-xsLhPrCCPlTzFmM3E-B6I%3D)

**From:** Team LaHood
**Subject: **This is what Democratic leadership looks like
**To:** **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=43a346c5dde44aa8b089c88312da1a54&_e=U1-SFWCPU0xvbbwSHzyDLsaosr34FBfXxjDT82MdLwwrSBChCcpsWNQgv3d-XAUB3Hb_mRmwOdKe-whqCguNLhJlQ8Z8244feaIlxqfOai26qLwSsdnv6-HdD6WBn2xdu0QDggomVaxGDdMxtezeHKtCq9Qfq6eOLrnHCMJ19UMPsWBWV8RcvmfZgCPb1QepOgL7y580pCHAPr1pBWY5UnRI135XnTalBqrm9G0a3YAdnLwdX3AGICsG3abE-94zrRL3HHWMK3UKClM4dqGD0HhFd-stjaY9HrR7XUkutfh56eZ_W0V2wS9I1dE-Z-joHpm-Q3dUgMqG6pD8cXfI0swXC2hrxmU0syICXRJhLTrAxjzygq01KxyAfuv1G-cya7gEAnoPL8j6wQ1ItNAPwy64qHY5Yo-L6PE_G5WYsgVSsUjfis07J-1KKm0HFk9Ws-YfqV_u9ztAMKG58xK5xYStRHc6xXWywjERBS-m5uE%3D)**

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi thinks she’s doing our country a favor by keeping Congress at home – and out of the House – during this crisis.

All that does is rob Americans of their voice in Washington at a time when they need it most.

_**Friend, this is EXACTLY why we need conservatives to take back the House this year.**_
[**CHIP IN TO HELP CONSERVATIVES TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=43a346c5dde44aa8b089c88312da1a54&_e=U1-SFWCPU0xvbbwSHzyDLsaosr34FBfXxjDT82MdLwwrSBChCcpsWNQgv3d-XAUB3Hb_mRmwOdKe-whqCguNLhJlQ8Z8244feaIlxqfOai26qLwSsdnv6-HdD6WBn2xdu0QDggomVaxGDdMxtezeHKtCq9Qfq6eOLrnHCMJ19UMPsWBWV8RcvmfZgCPb1QepOgL7y580pCHAPr1pBWY5UnRI135XnTalBqrm9G0a3YAdnLwdX3AGICsG3abE-94zrRL3HHWMK3UKClM4dqGD0LWa4x8TocaAlk4EiuaTpwty56wLcMBR834Y7mwkCWjZ4ANQDjQheCRPkMaPnpcAzwKkBY-r6x2dLMYJI1WoN1_qoJJt6omj2ZKQmGESGEg4LAz_1yYdADR9yEl1weiV9zS3PAw5_GAh4LtYNDQLPatQYgA2e1Wu3FipjGU7d8LzwOdSE3RoaGwbJAJPaTqCKpOT3qf3QCjSpZ_GOdL11IM%3D)
**Americans are looking to Congress for crucial leadership to keep the economy intact and to keep workers supported right now. What do we see?**

_We see a Republican-led Senate hard at work – conducting hearings, holding votes, and mapping out our country’s next steps to recover from this crisis._

_On the other hand, the House Chamber that has been vacant is finally going to re-open much to Nancy Pelosi's dismay._

**Darin knows that Congress can – and needs to – serve the American people better than it currently does.****We need change, and it has to start at the top.**
[**CHIP IN TO HELP CONSERVATIVES TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=43a346c5dde44aa8b089c88312da1a54&_e=U1-SFWCPU0xvbbwSHzyDLsaosr34FBfXxjDT82MdLwwrSBChCcpsWNQgv3d-XAUB3Hb_mRmwOdKe-whqCguNLhJlQ8Z8244feaIlxqfOai26qLwSsdnv6-HdD6WBn2xdu0QDggomVaxGDdMxtezeHKtCq9Qfq6eOLrnHCMJ19UMPsWBWV8RcvmfZgCPb1QepOgL7y580pCHAPr1pBWY5UnRI135XnTalBqrm9G0a3YAdnLwdX3AGICsG3abE-94zrRL3HHWMK3UKClM4dqGD0BQ73aSbchRFntBQIxXCvKCG2kAEKzKv8-JXY6TsHpWRoVTDeY-uikVMxPQcqpDwIuTWIU1tOxsSOd6w9YIacRKBTisAA0XzZIIKXtP-ZLVCzr3JYESwzXeVw81hBWyzbOMYMSYp8dhoGuLBdEveWVKK0IbdxRc35YvB5SCVgd_jho7x2mCnfeXglYBD_9-LFMhH5t7MJG6t0KkxCyMgbpw%3D)
Every day that Nancy Pelosi kept the doors to the House Chamber closed resulted in more businesses closing their doors and more jobs lost. We can’t afford another two years of her being in charge.

_**Will you join Darin and make sure that we don’t have another two years of Pelosi in charge?**_
[**CHIP IN TO HELP CONSERVATIVES TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=43a346c5dde44aa8b089c88312da1a54&_e=U1-SFWCPU0xvbbwSHzyDLsaosr34FBfXxjDT82MdLwwrSBChCcpsWNQgv3d-XAUB3Hb_mRmwOdKe-whqCguNLhJlQ8Z8244feaIlxqfOai26qLwSsdnv6-HdD6WBn2xdu0QDggomVaxGDdMxtezeHKtCq9Qfq6eOLrnHCMJ19UMPsWBWV8RcvmfZgCPb1QepOgL7y580pCHAPr1pBWY5UnRI135XnTalBqrm9G0a3YAdnLwdX3AGICsG3abE-94zrRL3HHWMK3UKClM4dqGD0CfKrX_lOAHaOd1oG8ZqitubsRs8xu_8Ctfat580-QUPJPRmNZ-WN-Y04f1uci5_KfccIaLGOvVxmIPBkv5Fr1627KUqrUqzOYMUwXCSKzJOlWJBos27JEKlI5B6R7kb05_GoKvzrR5YqNd5yHaMQzzETefNwXw9ajnCDeSJuD1l7vFWH8OymJOwHrxkt_Ex2RPI8bNEgf0dVksMbtMh7rg%3D)
Thank you,

Team LaHood

NY-24 is one of the ONLY seats left that is still represented by a Trump-supporting Republican that Hillary Clinton carried in 2016. And Francis Conole is our only chance to flip it from red to blue.
He's racked up major endorsements from VoteVets, Serve America, and has been awarded the the Gun Sense Candidate distinction from Moms Demand Action.
**Folks in this district -- and across the country -- are standing with Francis because they know this Iraq War Veteran can get the job done.**
[**So please, join us! name: Post Office Update (via VPP)
subject: John Oliver JUST said →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0492/72412298/4f16b8cd/6104b7fc/703600757/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1")

| | The post office in is collapsing in front of our very eyes, Peter **The post office in 18326 is collapsing in front of our very eyes, Peter -- and our democracy is on the line.** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0492/72412298/4f16b8cd/6104b7ff/703600757/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1") Primary elections across this country are currently running via vote-by-mail -- and as Democrats push to make November's election vote-by-mail they're running into a _Republican roadblock_. **The GOP is DISMANTLING the post office and UNDERMINING vote-by-mail in a DESPERATE effort to save President Trump and their Senate majority.** The USPS is "a literal lifeline" for American elections at this moment. **So, we 're taking a stand by asking 10,000 of our digital supporters to sign a petition to Save the Post Office. [Can we count on you to be one of those signatures?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0492/72412298/4f16b8cd/6104b7fe/703600757/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Can+we+count+on+you+to+be+one+of+those+s&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1")** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0492/72412298/4f16b8cd/6104b7e1/703600757/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1") _We need 250 signatures from Pennsylvania!_ Post offices aren't being attacked because of "mail delivery" \-- but because during the pandemic they've become the backbone of American democracy. **That 's why President Trump and his Republican party have spent the last few months destroying the foundation of the post office:**
* The President called the post office "a joke".
* Trump said he would VETO any coronavirus bill with funding for the post office.
* The new Postmaster General is a loyal Trump donor and crony.
* The RNC has $20 million to fight lawsuits on vote-by-mail.

_Peter Republicans are throwing everything they 've got at the Post Office in hopes it will crumble quietly._ They've got a new thing coming -- our grassroots digital supporters are fighting back! [**We 're hoping we can count on you to help us by being one of our 10,000 signatures! Will you sign our petition today?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0492/72412298/4f16b8cd/6104b7e0/703600757/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Wersquore+hoping+we+can+count+on+you+to+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1") | | | [Sign on to Save the Post Office NOW! >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0492/72412298/4f16b8cd/6104b7e3/703600757/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Sign+on+to+Save+the+Post+Office+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1")
---
_We need 250 signatures from Pennsylvania!_
Thanks for your swift action!
_\-- the Voter Protection Project_

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0492/72412298/4f16b8cd/6104b7e2/703600757/VEsB/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1")
---
| | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---
If you'd like to support the Voter Protection Project, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0492/72412298/4f16b8cd/6104b7e5/703600757/VEsO/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=8+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0492/72412298/4f16b8cd/6104b7e4/703600757/VEsP/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0492/72412298/4f16b8cd/6104b7e7/703600757/VEsHBQ/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=10+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200516_PostAttackRe_U2_X1")

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Fletcher Failed To Lead Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Last night, Lizzie Fletcher proved once again that there is nothing moderate about her and that she is just another vote for the same broken, radical Pelosi agenda that will not help Houston through these unprecedented times.

Our community, as well as the nation, faces unforeseen challenges and we need to guarantee that our real heroes, healthcare workers, first responders, small business owners and many more, have the support they need.

Fletcher and Pelosi’s bill not only falls short of meeting these goals, but in fact is nothing more than a $3 trillion socialist wishlist that if signed into law would cause catastrophic harm to our economy and to the energy sector in the 7th District.

Contrary to what Fletcher has said, the HEROES Act completely ignores the oil and gas industry and provides no funding for the Strategic Petroleum Reserve. Instead, it provides billions for “environmental justice”, gives illegal immigrants $1,200 taxpayer-funded checks and even releases criminals back onto our streets.

**It spends money that we don’t have on priorities that don’t help middle-class families in Houston. **

The HEROES Act represents everything wrong with Washington. Speaker Pelosi chose to pursue a purely partisan path, excluding Republicans in the drafting of this legislation. Instead of bringing both parties together to deliver a deal that would help the American people, Pelosi is using this bill as a vessel for her radical socialist agenda, and Lizzie Fletcher was more than happy to vote for it and defend it.

This partisan 1,800 page bill was voted on less than one week after it was released. With the Democrat-led House operating this way, it’s no wonder that more than 60% of Americans disapprove of the job Congress is doing.

The bill itself also has no chance of becoming law, and the Democratic leadership knows this. Instead of trying to pass meaningful legislation during a national crisis, Lizzie Fletcher and her party are posturing and playing politics. That is unacceptable and the people of 7th District deserve much better.

Both the process and content of the HEROES Act is a disgrace to the real heroes who have been on the front lines during the COVID19 crisis. Real leaders step up during the most challenging times and Lizzie Fletcher has once again failed to do so.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=aa14f08070fb43308bc0fe26f4a587eb&_e=Sqxvhu4lsi1IG9Z50h9HPvObyPyePRT80-BQ9HK5xvKVf1VTcUV1Uv2DzF8MS1owwKHqvLuhsYke3I7BYw9dSxbDOVOEkcV2dyo8nESxPL2oiJ8Vbgu-fyI3M-aBl3XsXgBLqK9q3Sid7T4RJUogCC298xBj7aLTgSHB_46V1yaKyYn5VR6liJBNUMBlwzrkPTyOHJZlGEtPl4xtDbhazuqfsZRSz_UzzGUSZbqxHSSAN2iLG2YaXk9dBm-u12hMKM7rV0PDhNCfM-LpN3W0S7NjCT-JFWzwGj8c4QNbk2U%3D)****

name: FLIP TEXAS ALERT
subject: he's the weakest politician in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn's team must be worried.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890075/7f51f7bc/4e40c507/4ef6b34c/3427705010/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890075/7f51f7bc/4e40c507/4ef6b343/3427705010/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200516.2nd__1435__&amount=10")
---
Hi Peter --

**After nearly 20 years in DC doing Mitch McConnell's bidding, Sen. John Cornyn is fighting for his political future -- and MJ is the candidate to beat him!** But with the runoff extended until July, there will now be even less time to campaign in a general election. **[That means we need your help NOW (if you're in a position to give) in order to build the campaign we need to win in November.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890075/7f51f7bc/4e40c507/4ef6b343/3427705010/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200516.2nd__1435__&amount=10")**

Sen. Cornyn and his big-money backers must be worried. Poll after poll has shown the majority of Texans **don 't approve of the job he's doing as their senator**, and a jaw-dropping 32% don't even know enough about him to rate his performance -- after TWO DECADES in office! It's no wonder **the nonpartisan Cook Political Report has already upgraded this race in MJ 's favor** \-- but we can't get complacent.

Sen. Cornyn's most recent fundraising report revealed that he now has nearly **$13 MILLION** cash on hand. With everything he's done for his special interest and corporate PAC donors over nearly 20 years in Washington, it's no surprise that they're going into overdrive to fill his campaign coffers and keep their ally in the Senate.

But MJ is doing things differently. clean_body: | My team and I ran the numbers one last time before midnight — and here’s the deal: Our campaign needs one final surge of grassroots support to make up for our missed fundraising goal and get us back on track for the FEC deadline next month. Will you pitch in to help? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With just a few weeks to go until the FEC deadline (and when our numbers go public!), we can’t afford to fall behind at the halfway mark. Not with so much on the line. Reaching this goal is critical to the success of our campaign and our work to keep Minnesota from flipping red. I wanted us to raise $50,000 by last night, but we didn't hit that goal, so I have to ask for your support again. Our math shows that if 8 supporters from Cresco chip in right now, we’ll be in good shape to make up what we lost. So, what do you say? Will you be 1 of the 8 people from Cresco we need to add a donation right now? Anything you’re able to contribute will make a difference: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I can’t thank you enough for anything you are able to give today. But I know this is an extremely difficult time for many of you, so please only pitch in if you can afford to do so. Take care of yourself and your loved ones. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

body:
If we don't act now, we'll lose our one chance to flip the Senate.
| | |
---
**BREAKING: KELLY LOEFFLER (R) LAUNCHES MASSIVE $4 MILLION AD BLITZ TO BUY GEORGIA 'S SENATE SEAT AND SAVE MCCONNELL'S GOP MAJORITY!**
Friend: After _The Washington Post_ reported that Georgia's race is KEY to deciding Senate control, Loeffler (R) started flooding the airwaves with a seven-figure ad buy attacking Democrats and propping up her campaign.
**Now, polling shows Loeffler (R) and Reverend Warnock (D) in a DEAD HEAT - and McConnell plans to line up the FULL backing of the Republican establishment to make sure she pulls ahead. **
Reverend Raphael Warnock is the strong Democratic leader we need to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats. His people-powered campaign is SURGING, but the GOP is pulling out all the stops to defeat him and protect their majority.
Loeffler is spending $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to buy this seat - so if we don't fight back NOW, we'll fall behind and lose our one shot at flipping Georgia blue and taking back the Senate.
**That 's why we set a rapid-response goal to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight - but time is running out, and we're falling incredibly short.****If you care about taking back the Senate and restoring moral leadership to Washington, we need your immediate grassroots support, friend:**

---
* * *
This week, for the first time in two months, I flew to D.C. to go to work.
Logan Airport was empty. I shared a plane with eight (masked) passengers. Shortly after I landed, I stepped into a House committee room on Capitol Hill for the first time months - gloves and mask on, wiping down the chair and desk around me.
I was there to question Rick Bright, a vaccine expert who was ousted by Trump's Department of Health and Human Services for doing his duty as a patriot: he blew the whistle on the administration's failed response to COVID-19.
**His testimony and responses to my questions made one thing abundantly clear: This Administration knew how unprepared we were, and still chose to do nothing.**
When I asked when there were first concerns about COVID-19, Mr. Bright responded: _" Early January."_
**_Early January._ We could have acted sooner. But this administration chose not to. Now, 88,237 Americans are dead.**
_We could have saved lives._
To make it even worse, Mr. Bright confirmed that the outgoing Obama Administration ran a pandemic simulation for Trump's team back in 2017, which uncovered systemic flaws in our country's readiness for a virus like COVID-19. Instead of taking it seriously, the Trump administration decimated CDC budgets and gutted the White House Pandemic Response Team on the National Security Council.
Mr. Bright answered my questions on Thursday to the best of his abilities. I appreciate him shedding light on the President's response. **But it only reinforced what we already knew: The Trump Administration botched this crisis from the start.**
**And for me, it reinforced exactly why I decided to run for Senate - because we need stronger leadership in Washington. Not just to take on Donald Trump but to take on the decades of bad judgment and bad choices that left us so vulnerable to this virus in the first place.**
The effort to recover and rebuild will be the fight of a generation. And I'll be in it with you, every step of the way.
**[We have a difficult Senate race ahead. If you agree we need stronger leadership in Washington, please chip in $5 or $10 to our fight. Every donation and every bit you are able to send is critical, with only 108 days left in this race.](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-Testimony?refcode=E2827-20200516-Testimony_zombie-SL&amount=5&amounts=5,10,35,100,250")**
If you can't pitch in right now, that is okay. Know, your support, your advocacy and being part of this fight means the world. Know that I will continue to do everything I can to fight to hold the Trump administration accountable. We need resources. We need relief. We need recovery. And I will fight for you every step of the way. Be well. Be safe. Talk soon.
- Joe
|
